source: At the time , I just thought he was squandering a marvelous opportunity . When I was asked to comment on the situation , I wrote that some of the things Lehrer had done were uncool , while some were fairly harmless . But Lehrer himself acknowledged that what he was done was stupid , lazy , and wrong . So I figured he 'd gotten the sort of school detention that wakes you up and keeps you from getting expelled .
domestication: 当时我觉得他就是在浪费一个大好机会。后来有人让我对这事发表看法，我就写了莱勒做的有些事确实不地道，但有些倒也无伤大雅。不过他自己也承认，他的所作所为确实愚蠢、懒惰，而且是错的。所以我想，这次教训应该能让他清醒过来，不至于被彻底开除。
foreignization: 当时，我只是认为他浪费了一个极好的机会。当被要求对这种情况发表评论时，我写道莱勒所做的一些事情是不酷的，而一些则是相当无害的。但莱勒本人承认他所做的事是愚蠢、懒惰和错误的。所以我认为他已经得到了那种能让你清醒过来、不至于被开除的学校留校察看处分。

source: I had the good fortune to be at a talk by your comrade in arms against lunacy Bruce Chassy yesterday ( David and Steve both got mentions ! ) -- interestingly he places simply overeating as the main cause of food related illness ( not quite food borne ... but kinda ! I must admit I had n't even considered it that way ) then microbes etc -- I 'd strongly recommend anyone interested in the issues at hand to catch a talk by him -- although do n't expect time for questions at the end !
domestication: 昨天我有幸听了一场由你的战友布鲁斯·查西的演讲（大卫和史蒂夫也都被提到了！）——有趣的是，他把吃得太多当作是食物相关疾病的主要原因（虽然不完全是食物传播的……但也有点关系！我得承认，我之前还真没从这个角度考虑过），然后才是微生物等等因素。我强烈建议对这些问题感兴趣的朋友们去听听他的演讲——不过别指望最后会有提问的时间！
foreignization: 我有幸参加了你抗击荒谬的战友布鲁斯·查西昨天的演讲（大卫和史蒂夫都得到了提及！）——有趣的是，他将单纯吃得过多视为食物相关疾病的主要原因（不是完全由食物传播……但有点类似！我必须承认我甚至没有从这个角度考虑过）然后才是微生物等——我强烈推荐任何对此问题感兴趣的人都去听他的演讲——不过不要指望最后有时间提问！

source: As for the season , I think that I would blow it up . If you even can . Trade whatever is not named JZimm , Ramos , Espy or Desi from the big league team for a position player that you could . I would trade any bullpen guy if he could bring a position player piece . source: Imagine a room full of beautiful , talented , energetic girls . Everyone you look at is stunning and so incredibly nice . As you look around the room you see a wall of " hall of fame " jerseys with the last names Stockton , Malone and Dantley . The greatest basketball players to date ! The floor that you are standing on is the floor that the NBA players , that you 've watched every game night , actually practice on ! And on top of that just picture being mixed with nerves so strong and excitement just as equally strong . This is what my experience trying out to be a Nu Skin Jazz dancer was like .

source: The only people who think this argument began , continues or ends up being about Amanda is Amanda and a few of her supporters . ALL of us have been trying to move this discussion off of Amanda and back to the issue : white people appropriating the work and knowledge of women of color . Changing the name to X was not to silence Amanda but to avoid the idea that Amanda is personally responsible for every white person who appropriates ideas and knowledge from others .
domestication: 只有阿曼达和她的一些支持者还在纠缠这个争论是不是从她开始、围绕着她或者因为她而结束。我们所有人一直在努力把讨论从阿曼达身上转移到真正的问题上：白人占用有色女性的工作和知识。把名字改成X并不是为了封住阿曼达的嘴，而是为了避免给人留下这样的印象：好像每个占用他人思想和知识的白人都要阿曼达个人来负责。
foreignization: 唯一认为这场争论始于、持续于或最终归结到艾曼达本人的，只有艾曼达和她的一些支持者。我们所有人都一直在试图将这一讨论从艾曼达身上转移开，回归到问题本身：白人盗用有色女性的工作和知识。将名称更改为X并不是为了封杀艾曼达，而是为了避免让人觉得艾曼达要对每一个盗用他人想法和知识的白人个人负责。

source: At no point were Constitutional rights ever surrendered . When you board an airplane , you are agreeing to the terms and conditions the airlines have described on the back of the ticket . Flying is not a right , it is a privilege . There is nothing in the bill of rights that says every person in America has the right to fly commercial .

source: A new report from the NPD Group says that even though wages have flattened in recent years , cable prices have continued to increase by 6% every year . And with those carriage fee disputes only resulting in higher prices for subscribers , NPD predicts that by 2015 , the average cable bill will be $123 and will soar to $200 by 2020 .
domestication: NPD集团的新报告显示，尽管近几年工资停滞不前，但有线电视费却年年上涨6%。由于频道传输费争端最终都转嫁到消费者头上，NPD预测，到2015年，平均有线电视账单将涨到123美元，到了2020年更是要飙升至200美元。这真是让人哭笑不得，工资不动，倒是电视费跑得比兔子还快。

Did these ' Authorities ' consider nothing was done by anyon eto thwart their ( our ' terrosisits ' ) efforts , but just some ' suspicious ' activity reported ; so it can not be ' as ' serious ?

确切。有人考虑到飞机还没有爆炸或被劫持吗？早上好？即使有那三个棕色皮肤的恐怖分子一直在密谋，其中两个还在洗手间里待了比平时更长的时间（而且回到座位上时手里没有枪或炸弹），它还是安全着陆了。这些“当局”有没有考虑到没有任何人采取行动来阻止我们这些“恐怖分子”的行动，而只是报告了一些“可疑”活动；所以这不能算是“那么”严重？

source: Every week , WoW Insider brings you Arcane Brilliance for arcane , fire and frost mages . This week , we 've hit level 90 . We 've stood up , stretched , rubbed the mucus out of our eyes , apologized to our wives , kids , pets , plants , and anyone else we have been neglecting , and gone outside to remember what outside looks like . Then we 've promptly gone back inside because outside is way more attractive in Pandaria .
domestication: 每周，《魔兽内幕》都会为奥术、火焰和冰霜法师带来《奥术光辉》专栏。这周，我们终于升到了90级。我们站起身，伸了个懒腰，揉了揉惺忪的睡眼，向老婆、孩子、宠物、花草，还有所有被我们冷落的人道了歉，然后出门去重温外面的世界。结果一出去就发现还是潘达利亚的风景更养眼，于是立马又回家了。

source: A-foot stompin ' -MEN ! ! ! ! ! ! ! ! I really think that 's what accounts for a lot of people thinking parenthood is soooooo hard -- the ridiculous expectations put people on themselves and on others . Parenthood is a big and important and at times very difficult job , but it does n't need to be made near-impossible by strange societal expectations that there should be no limits to the inconvenience and impracticality incurred by any given parenting choice .

source: The winds of Hurricane Sandy caused massive damage to the New York area when it made landfall at the end of October . But the gusts of the superstorm blew more than just debris , dislodging New Yorkers from their homes and into a constellation of already full shelters . Yet in spite of the issue of overcrowding both before or after the storm , there may actually be large amounts of space to house people in the city .
domestication: 飓风桑迪在十月底登陆时，给纽约地区带来了巨大的破坏。这股超级风暴不仅吹散了碎片，还把许多纽约人从家中吹进了已经挤得满满的避难所。然而，尽管风暴前后都面临人满为患的问题，其实城里可能还有大量空间可以安置这些人。

source: our own citizens do plot against us ! ! There are Americans involved in terrorist activities . That is part of the problem ! ! domestication:
咱们自己的国民竟然也和我们作对！！有美国人参与恐怖活动，这确实是问题的一部分！！我对这次事件感到很遗憾，但也理解那位举报者的立场。真希望他们能更仔细地观察，如果真如你所说（从没离开过座位，没和任何人交谈等），那这种事本不该发生的！！不过我现在一想到坐飞机就紧张。我在飞机上确实会特别留意周围的人。我同意，随便问问就好了。美国人种族多样，国籍各异，所以我确实会对每个人都保持警惕！！  
艾莉森  贾斯汀

source: The CSA uses a standards and regulatory approach to cybersecurity , but many troubling questions that The Heritage Foundation asked in July still remain . Until Congress can adequately answer these important questions , this bill remains highly flawed due to problems with information sharing , regulation , cost , and security and effectiveness .
domestication: CSA采取了一种标准和法规相结合的方式来应对网络安全，但美国传统基金会七月份提出的一系列令人担忧的问题至今仍未得到解决。国会在未能妥善解答这些重要问题之前，这项法案因信息共享、监管、成本以及安全性和有效性等方面的问题而显得漏洞百出。

source: The one drawback to the urine testing was that the sample was not as easily attained as it was in the saliva test . Normally , horses will pass urine from a few minutes to an hour after cooling out , but in one instance at Hialeah , in which a horse won and paid $196 , the assistant was forced to wait in the stall until 9 o'clock that night . There was another case in which an inspector had to wait over nine hours for the horse to urinate .

source: GM really went down the toilet when , one day , the Powers that Be started taking their customers for granted . It started about 1980 . Before that , GM made a decent car for the money . What happened was the Japanese made better cars for the money . Instead of raising the ante with a better product to respond to eroding market share , GM intentionally made their cars cheaper so they could make more profit per unit .
domestication: 通用汽车真是一落千丈了。大概是从1980年开始的，那些大人物们开始对顾客不放在眼里。在这之前，通用还能算是在性价比上拿得出手。后来日本人造出了更物有所值的好车。面对市场份额的下滑，通用非但没有通过提升产品来应对，反而故意降低了汽车的质量，好在每辆车的利润上多赚点。这下子可真是捡了芝麻丢了西瓜。
foreignization: GM 真的在走下坡路，有一天，那些掌权者开始轻视他们的客户。这大约始于1980年。在此之前，GM 生产的汽车物有所值。后来发生了什么？日本人生产了更物有所值的汽车。面对市场份额的流失，GM 没有通过改进产品来提高竞争力，而是故意降低汽车质量以增加每辆车的利润。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

GM really went down the toilet when , one day , the Powers that Be started taking their customers for granted . It started about 1980 . Before that , GM made a decent car for the money . What happened was the Japanese made better cars for the money . Instead of raising the ante with a better product to respond to eroding market share , GM intentionally made their cars cheaper so they could make more profit per unit .

source: There is no reason that a healthy man or woman ( or whatever combination of partners ) ca n't both do their share of household stuff if they ca n't afford to hire someone else . messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

There is no reason that a healthy man or woman ( or whatever combination of partners ) ca n't both do their share of household stuff if they ca n't afford to hire someone else . I am personally turned off by any guy who ca n't simply clean up after himself in basic ways . And guys who are " above " cleaning or laundry or chores ? Do n't care how otherwise appealing you may be , I " m not sharing my life with someone who expects me to be the equivalent of a house maid/servant .
没有理由说一个健康的男人或女人（或者任何组合的伴侣）如果他们雇不起别人的话，不能分担家务。我个人对任何不能简单地在基本方面自己清理的男人感到反感。而那些“高高在上”不做清洁、洗衣或家务的男人？不管你们在其他方面有多吸引人，我都不介意，我不会和一个期望我成为家庭主妇/仆人的人分享我的生活。

source: That would only be the case if it were dangerous to consume all pesticides . It is n't . Notwithstanding the dose effect of most pesticides ( ie they may be dangerous at some dose , but in tiny quantities have no effect ) many pesticides ( particularly Bt and Glyphosate ) have no effect thus negating the pivotal point of your otherwise logical statement .
domestication: 这只有在所有农药都危险到不能食用的情况下才成立，但事实并非如此。虽然大多数农药确实有剂量效应，也就是说在一定剂量下它们可能有害，但微量时则无害。特别是像Bt和草甘膦这样的农药，即使摄入量较大，也几乎没有什么影响，这就反驳了你这个看似合理的观点的关键点。
foreignization: 那只有在所有农药都有危险的情况下才会如此。并不是这样。尽管大多数农药的剂量效应（即在某些剂量下它们可能是危险的，但在微量时则没有影响）许多农药（尤其是Bt和草甘膦）都没有影响，从而否定了你其他方面合乎逻辑的论点的关键点。

source: What do the Ulema say about the murder of Governor of Punjab ( Pakistan ) Salman Taseer who was killed by his own security guard . The guard claimed that he killed Salman Taseer because he was blasphemous to the Prophet ( peace by upon him ) . However , there is no evidence of Salman Taseer 's blasphemy to the Prophet ( pbuh ) . What do the Ulema say about many people who are praising Salman Taseer 's killer ?
domestication: 乌莱玛（伊斯兰学者）对巴基斯坦旁遮普省长萨尔曼·塔希尔被其安保人员杀害一事有何看法？这名安保人员声称，他之所以杀害塔希尔，是因为塔希尔对先知（愿主福安之）不敬。然而，并没有证据证明塔希尔真的对先知不敬。乌莱玛又是怎么看那些赞美塔希尔杀手的人的呢？
foreignization: 乌里玛对于旁遮普省（巴基斯坦）省长萨尔曼·塔希尔被其安保人员杀害一事有何看法？该安保人员声称，他因萨尔曼·塔希尔对先知（愿主赐他平安）不敬而将其杀害。然而，没有证据表明萨尔曼·塔希尔对先知（愿主赐他平安）有任何不敬行为。乌里玛对于许多赞扬萨尔曼·塔希尔杀手的人有何看法？

source: Failure to act now leads to inevitable financial disadvantage and inefficiency , and both are severely punished in any marketplace . Consolidators from hospitals to drug stores to physical therapy providers are joining together with the power to negotiate preferred pricing and reimbursements while they maximize the benefits of economies of scale . They work on improving every day . They are run by business professionals who know healthcare . They are preparing for the future .
domestication: 现在不行动，将来肯定会吃亏，市场上对财务劣势和低效率的惩罚可是毫不留情。从医院到药店再到理疗机构，这些整合者正联合起来，凭借强大的谈判力争取更优惠的价格和报销政策，同时充分利用规模经济的优势。他们每天都努力改进，由懂医疗行业的专业人士经营管理，正为未来做准备。

source: Well statedl ! Maybe this is why 40 percent of Americans are highly suspicious of Darwinism and Dawkins , who repeatedly refers of creationists as " history deniers " . This is precisely what evolutionary theory amounts to : A subjective " interpretation " of historical data relating to unobserved distant past events . With all interpretations based on " inferences " and " assumptions " as to what the historical data SUPPOSEDLY represents , and what SUPPOSEDLY happened in the distant past . With no possible way of ever empirically verifying that evolution happened one way , and not another way , or even whether the evolutionary continuum happened at all . Meaning , despite the claims of Darwin 's disciples , evolutionary theory is neither wonderfully clear , nor simple .
domestication: 说得好！可能这就是为什么有40%的美国人对达尔文主义和道金斯持有高度怀疑的态度。道金斯一再将创造论者称为“历史否认者”。进化论归根结底就是一种主观的“解读”，是对未被观察到的远古历史数据的解读。所有这些解读都建立在“推测”和“假设”之上，猜测这些历史数据到底代表了什么，远古时代究竟发生了什么。然而，没有任何方法可以实证地验证进化是以某种方式发生的，而不是以另一种方式，甚至无法证实进化过程是否真的存在过。所以，尽管达尔文的追随者们怎么说，进化论既不那么清楚明了，也不那么简单直白。
foreignization: 说得很好！也许这就是为什么40%的美国人对达尔文主义和道金斯高度怀疑，后者反复将创造论者称为“历史否认者”。这正是进化理论的本质：对未被观察到的遥远过去事件的历史数据的一种主观“解释”。所有解释都基于对历史数据所“据称”代表的内容以及在遥远的过去“据称”发生的事情的“推断”和“假设”。没有任何可能的方法可以实证验证进化是按某种方式发生的，而不是另一种方式，甚至是否真的发生了进化连续体。也就是说，尽管达尔文的门徒声称，进化理论既不清晰，也不简单。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Well statedl ! Maybe this is why 40 percent of Americans are highly suspicious of Darwinism and Dawkins , who repeatedly refers of creationists as " history deniers " . This is precisely what evolutionary theory amounts to : A subjective " interpretation " of historical data relating to unobserved distant past events . With all interpretations based on " inferences " and " assumptions " as to what the historical data SUPPOSEDLY represents , and what SUPPOSEDLY happened in the distant past . With no possible way of ever empirically verifying that evolution happened one way , and not another way , or even whether the evolutionary continuum happened at all . Meaning , despite the claims of Darwin 's disciples , evolutionary theory is neither wonderfully clear , nor simple .

source: This pan video gives a closer look at a huge new image of the central parts of the Milky Way made by combining thousands of images from ESO 's VISTA telescope on Paranal in Chile and compares it with the view in visible light . These infrared data , which come from the VVV public survey , have been used to study a much larger number of individual stars in the central parts of the Milky Way than ever before . Because VISTA has a camera sensitive to infrared light it can see through much of the dust blocking the view in visible light , although many more opaque dust filaments still show up well in this picture . Credit : ESO/VVV Consortium/Nick Risinger , Music : Delmo -- Acoustic , Acknowledgement : Ignacio Toledo
domestication: 这段视频详细展示了由智利帕拉纳尔的欧洲南方天文台VISTA望远镜拍摄的数千张图像合成的银河系中心区域的巨大新图，并将其与可见光下的景象进行了对比。这些来自VVV公共调查项目的红外数据，让科学家能够以前所未有的规模研究银河系中心的恒星。因为VISTA装有对红外光敏感的相机，所以能穿透大部分阻挡可见光的尘埃，尽管许多更不透明的尘埃丝仍然在这张图片中清晰可见。图片版权：ESO/VVV联盟/尼克·莱辛格，音乐：德尔莫——原声，致谢：伊格纳西奥·托莱多。
foreignization: 这个全景视频更仔细地展示了由智利帕拉纳尔的ESO的VISTA望远镜拍摄的数千张图像合成的银河系中心部分的巨大新图像，并将其与可见光下的视图进行比较。这些来自VVV公共巡天的红外数据已被用于研究银河系中心区域比以往任何时候都多的个别恒星。由于VISTA配备了一台对红外光敏感的相机，它能够穿透阻挡可见光视线的大部分尘埃，尽管许多更不透明的尘埃丝在这个图像中仍然清晰可见。致谢：ESO/VVV联盟/Nick Risinger，音乐：Delmo -- Acoustic，鸣谢：Ignacio Toledo

This pan video gives a closer look at a huge new image of the central parts of the Milky Way made by combining thousands of images from ESO 's VISTA telescope on Paranal in Chile and compares it with the view in visible light . These infrared data , which come from the VVV public survey , have been used to study a much larger number of individual stars in the central parts of the Milky Way than ever before . Because VISTA has a camera sensitive to infrared light it can see through much of the dust blocking the view in visible light , although many more opaque dust filaments still show up well in this picture . Credit : ESO/VVV Consortium/Nick Risinger , Music : Delmo -- Acoustic , Acknowledgement : Ignacio Toledo

这段视频详细展示了由智利帕拉纳尔的欧洲南方天文台VISTA望远镜拍摄的数千张图像合成的银河系中心区域的巨大新图，并将其与可见光下的景象进行了对比。这些来自VVV公共调查项目的红外数据，让科学家能够以前所未有的规模研究银河系中心的恒星。因为VISTA装有对红外光敏感的相机，所以能穿透大部分阻挡可见光的尘埃，尽管许多更不透明的尘埃丝仍然在这张图片中清晰可见。图片版权：ESO/VVV联盟/尼克·莱辛格，音乐：德尔莫——原声，致谢：伊格纳西奥·托莱多。

source: Between 1973 and 1990 , when my beloved mother passed away , she and her female romantic partner raised me . They had separate houses but spent nearly all their weekends together , with me , in a trailer tucked discreetly in an RV park 50 minutes away from the town where we lived . As the youngest of my mother 's biological children , I was the only child who experienced childhood without my father being around .

source: I think you are missing the point of why she wrote these things ... she was pointing out the own judgmental things that went through her mind during an ordeal that unless you have lived it , you can not pretend to understand or imagine . Later in her story she admits making these unfounded judgments ( which you 're right , we are ALL guilty of ) , and says that doing so is always a dangerous , bad thing . It does not make her words fall flat -- it gives them sincerity . She is not being hateful or holier-than , she is being human . I would like to say that I wish some of the people writing ignorant , hurtful comments could understand that , but I have a feeling that those comments would find themselves to horrible stories like this no matter the circumstances .
domestication: 我觉得你没抓住她写这些话的重点……她是想指出自己在那段经历中产生的那些评判性想法，除非你亲身经历过，否则你根本无法假装理解或想象。后来在她的故事里，她承认自己做出了那些没有根据的判断（没错，我们每个人都会犯这种错误），并说这样做总是危险且不好的。这并没有使她的话显得无力——反而让她的言语更真诚了。她并不是在恨别人或自以为比别人高明，她只是在展示自己的人性。真希望能有那些写出无知、伤害他人评论的人能明白这一点，但我感觉无论什么情况下，这些评论都会出现在类似的故事里。
foreignization: 我认为你没有理解她写这些东西的目的……她是在指出在一场除非亲身经历过否则无法假装理解或想象的困境中，自己内心的那些评判性想法。在她的故事后面，她承认做出了这些毫无根据的判断（你是对的，我们都犯过这种错误），并说这样做总是危险的、不好的事情。这并不会使她的话失去力度——反而赋予了它们真诚。她并不是在仇恨或自以为是，她只是在展现人性。我想说，我希望一些写无知、伤害性评论的人能够理解这一点，但我感觉无论情况如何，这些评论都会出现在像这样的可怕故事中。

source: ( this is a rhetorical question . the answer is , " Never " , in both cases . As with the FSU , GM was Hopeless . source: The fact is that , in spite of the wars incited by America and it allies that have cost half to a million ( mostly muslim ) lives , there are very , very few people eager to sacrifice themselves in terrorist attacks , and approximately nobody with the means and faculties to pull off anything more than an IED in their own Iraqi or Afghan neighborhood .

内部覆盖着平板屏幕和“互动的、动手的、博物馆式的、精心制作的照片和电影。”参观期间一台电视播放着“寺庙内部房间、封印室、洗礼池（称为‘洗礼坛’）的图像，令人惊讶的是，它具有原始的艺术感，按美国人的理解，因为它安放在12头雕刻的公牛上，这些公牛代表以色列的12个部落。”

source: As we contemplate the horrific damage caused by Hurricane Sandy , the world of design may seem remote from our most immediate concerns . Yet the urgent needs that follow large-scale catastrophes -- the need for shelter , clean water , alternative sources of power -- can be particularly conducive to creative solutions . I recently observed that breakthroughs in architecture and industrial design have emerged during wartime ; now a remarkable new exhibition in Oslo shows that the same can hold true for natural disasters as well .
domestication: 当我们面对桑迪飓风带来的可怕破坏时，设计界似乎与我们最紧迫的关切相去甚远。然而，在大规模灾难之后，急需解决的问题如避难所、干净的水和替代能源，恰恰能激发创造性的解决方案。我最近观察到，战争期间常常会出现建筑和工业设计上的突破；现在奥斯陆的一个新展览显示，自然灾害同样也能激发类似的创意。
foreignization: 当我们思考飓风桑迪造成的可怕破坏时，设计界似乎与我们最紧迫的关切相距甚远。然而，大规模灾难后出现的迫切需求——对庇护所、清洁水源和替代能源的需求——特别有利于创造性的解决方案。我最近观察到，建筑和工业设计方面的突破性进展往往出现在战争期间；现在，奥斯陆一个引人注目的新展览表明，自然灾害同样也能激发类似的创新。

source: This right here shows all the ignorance of modern science one could ever hope for . You do n't make big money doing science ( some might , but certainly not in academia , and certainly not when you 're the poor bugger doing the actual science , rather than the poor bugger up to their ears in grant proposals after maybe a decade or so of doing the actual science ) -- money , power , funding and recognition are all easily up for grabs -- ask Gilles Seralini , ask Putzai -- these are the names that are remembered , these are the guys doing the international tours and influencing the decision making process of blocs of nations -- nobody remembers Joe nobody who makes the rather uncontrovertial discovery that apparently yes , GM soy still does n't actually have any effects whatsoever on rats when you do the experiments right .
domestication: 这简直就是现代科学无知的集中表现。做科学研究赚不了大钱（有些人可能例外，但在学术界绝无可能，特别是那些真正埋头苦干的科研人员，而不是那些在十年后才开始整天忙于申请经费的家伙）。钱、权力、资金和认可，这些都唾手可得——问问吉勒斯·塞拉利尼，问问普特扎伊吧。这些人被人们记住，他们四处巡讲，影响着国家集团的决策过程。谁还会记得那个默默无闻的乔，他发现转基因大豆其实对老鼠没有任何影响，只要实验做得足够严谨。
foreignization: 这正好显示了现代科学所能希望展现的所有无知。你做科学研究赚不到大钱（有些人可能赚得到，但肯定不是在学术界，也肯定不是当你是一个真正做科学的可怜虫，而不是那个在做了大约十年的实际科学工作后埋头于基金申请的可怜虫时）--金钱、权力、资金和认可都是唾手可得的--问问吉勒斯·塞尔利尼，问问普兹奈--这些是被记住的名字，这些人正在国际上巡回演讲，并影响着国家集团的决策过程--没有人会记得那个做出相对无可争议的发现的无名小卒乔，即显然，转基因大豆在正确实验条件下对老鼠实际上没有任何影响。

source: Moments later , he stalked down the claustrophobic aisle , his long arms reaching to steady him on metal bars placed periodically along his path , a snarling glance passing over the faces of the four other passengers heading north on Vermont that Thursday night . source: In this video Kerry shows a progression in walking through various fitness techniques . In the beginning Kerry shows how she uses walking devices ( poles ) during her fitness routine , on a stair stepper ( in the gym ) , and going up a hill ( to improve knee and hip strength ) . Later in the video Kerry demonstrates how she does these same activities outside of the gym with only one pole . For all of the activities demonstrated , Kerry does them twice , one right after the other , to show how her body becomes increasingly familiar with the movements that are needed to perform the activity . For example , as Kerry does the Fox Trot the second time , it is obvious that her body movements are becoming more fluid .
domestication: 在这段视频里，凯瑞展示了她在健身时一步步提高的各种技巧。一开始，凯瑞演示了如何在她的健身过程中使用步行辅助工具（比如手杖），无论是用跑步机上的楼梯（在健身房里），还是爬山（来增强膝盖和臀部的力量）。到了视频的后半部分，凯瑞则展示了如何在健身房外只用一根手杖来做这些相同的活动。对于所有展示的活动，凯瑞都会连续做两次，一次接着一次，以显示她的身体是如何逐渐适应所需的动作的。比如说，当凯瑞第二次做狐步舞时，明显可以看出她的动作变得更加流畅自如。

source: However , I disagree with the conclusions of this paper , for a variety of reasons . First , the climate history of Africa is consistent with older dispersal scenarios . The authors of the current paper follow other researchers into attributing the Skhul/Qafzeh hominins to an **25;3694;TOOLONG , but that proposition is increasingly untenable .

foreignization: 然而，我不同意这篇论文的结论，原因有多个。首先，非洲的气候历史与较早的扩散情景一致。当前论文的作者们跟随其他研究人员将斯库尔/卡夫泽人类归因于**25;3694;TOOLONG，但这一命题越来越站不住脚。

However , I disagree with the conclusions of this paper , for a variety of reasons . First , the climate history of Africa is consistent with older dispersal scenarios . The authors of the current paper follow other researchers into attributing the Skhul/Qafzeh hominins to an **25;3694;TOOLONG , but that proposition is increasingly untenable .
不过，我对这篇论文的结论持不同意见，原因有几点。首先，非洲的气候历史与早期的人类迁徙理论是一致的。而本文的作者和其他研究者认为斯胡尔/卡夫泽人类属于某一特定时期的观点，现在看来越来越站不住脚了。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

However , I disagree with the conclusions of this paper , for a variety of reasons . First , the climate history of Africa is consistent with older dispersal scenarios . The authors of the current paper follow other researchers into attributing the Skhul/Qafzeh hominins to an **25;3694;TOOLONG , but that proposition is increasingly untenable .
然而，我不同意这篇论文的结论，原因有多个。首先，非洲的气候历史与较早的扩散情景一致。当前论文的作者们跟随其他研究人员将斯库尔/卡夫泽人类归因于**25;3694;TOOLONG，但这一命题越来越站不住脚。

source: Xe confirmed last week that it had reached out-of-court settlements in seven lawsuits filed in the September 2007 shooting in Nisoor Square that killed 17 Iraqis , as well as a string of other incidents in which company guards are alleged to have killed or injured Iraqis . Altogether , the suits covered 45 injured people and the families of 19 slain Iraqis who have all signed settlement agreements , according to court documents .

source: Returning to the broader subject of shale plays in general , why do operators keep drilling while their own over-production has depressed the price of natural gas by half of its value since January 2010 ? The extremely high prices for land in all of these plays has produced a commodity market more attractive than the natural gas produced .

source: In the fall of 1972 , after his first year of law school , Romney matriculated at the business school as part of the joint-degree program , which included only a handful of students . HLS Professor Detlev F. Vagts ' 51 headed the program and says he got to know the J.D./M.B.A. students better than most law students . Joint-degree students pass two different admissions processes , with the business school placing " a great deal more emphasis on background experience , personality and numerical competence , " Vagts says , while the law school focused primarily on academic record .
domestication: 1972年秋天，罗姆尼在法学院读完第一年后，加入了联合学位项目，进入了商学院学习，当时这个项目的学生屈指可数。哈佛法学院教授德特莱夫·F·瓦格茨说，他比对大多数法学生更了解这些J.D./M.B.A.双学位学生。双学位学生要经过两次不同的录取过程，商学院更看重申请者的背景经历、性格和数字能力，而法学院主要关注学术成绩。

source: The act was definitely supported by far more Rs than Ds . Yes , Obama could use executive order to modify the agencies , but Presidents rarely institute major changes in programs instituted by their predecessors without an act of Congress , and the President 's job is to enforce law created by Congress , not to modify it . Yes , he could have vetoed the reauthorization , but the veto would have been overridden , and Presidents hate it when that happens .  RR
domestication: 这项法案显然得到了更多共和党人的支持，而不是民主党人。是的，奥巴马可以通过行政命令调整机构，但总统很少在没有国会法案的情况下，对前任留下的项目进行重大改动，因为总统的职责是执行国会制定的法律，而不是修改法律。他当然可以否决重新授权，但这种否决会被推翻，而总统们最不喜欢的就是这种事。RR

source: The United States and Russia continue to face a common threat from al Qaeda and other terrorist groups operating in and around Afghanistan . We recognize that this is a pivotal time for international efforts to strengthen security and promote economic development in Afghanistan , as well as to counter the narcotics threat . With the successful implementation of bilateral and multilateral transit arrangements , Russia has made a significant contribution to international efforts to promote stability in Afghanistan .
domestication: 美国和俄罗斯仍然面临着来自阿富汗及其周边地区的“基地”组织和其他恐怖组织的共同威胁。我们都认识到，现在是国际社会加强阿富汗安全、促进经济发展以及打击毒品走私的关键时刻。通过双边和多边过境协议的成功实施，俄罗斯在推动阿富汗稳定方面做出了重要贡献。

source: One technique I like a lot is when someone will link to Blogger A " via Blogger B , " so that both the original blogger and the blogger you happen to be reading get credit . When we only link Blogger B , it starts to look like Blogger B is the one who should get the credit . If we make an effort to at least track down the original source , that would make a huge difference .
domestication: 我特别喜欢一种做法，就是在引用时提到“通过博主B链接到博主A”，这样既给原作者点赞，也给当前阅读的博主加分。如果我们只链接到博主B，就显得好像功劳全归博主B了。如果咱们能费点心思找到最初的源头，那可真是大不一样了。
foreignization: 我喜欢的一种技巧是当有人会链接到博主A“通过博主B”，这样既给了原博主也给了你碰巧在阅读的博主信用。当我们只链接博主B时，开始看起来像是博主B是那个应该得到信用的人。如果我们努力至少追踪到原始来源，那将产生巨大的差异。

source: I 'm thinking now about varieties of tricks science writers can use to deal with this problem -- but the point for this mini-rant is one you 've argued before when I 've been in the audience : the purpose of public science communication is to convey ideas to broad audiences , often though not always using very specific and inevitably partial reports from within the field being covered . That there are costs in doing so is obvious -- but that it is possible to do it well , and to do it in ways that the costs are not those that mislead audiences , but rather require them to read more if they want a finer-grained appreciation of where a given piece of knowledge comes from .
domestication: 我现在在琢磨科学作家们可以用来解决这个问题的各种招数——不过，我今天小发牢骚的重点是你以前在我当听众时就讲过的：科普的目的就是把科学思想传达给广大公众，通常会用到该领域内非常具体但不可避免地带有片面性的报告。这样做肯定有代价——但关键在于，完全可以做得好，而且可以让代价不至于误导观众，而是让那些想深入了解知识来源的人去读更多的东西。
foreignization: 我现在在思考科学作家可以用来处理这个问题的各种技巧——但这次小型抨击的重点是你以前在我作为听众时曾经争论过的：公共科学传播的目的是向广泛的受众传达思想，通常（但不总是）使用来自所报道领域的非常具体且不可避免地具有片面性的报告。这样做会有代价，这是显而易见的——但有可能做得很好，并且以这样的方式来做，即这些代价不会误导受众，而是要求他们如果想要更细致地了解某项知识的来源的话，需要阅读更多内容。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I 'm thinking now about varieties of tricks science writers can use to deal with this problem -- but the point for this mini-rant is one you 've argued before when I 've been in the audience : the purpose of public science communication is to convey ideas to broad audiences , often though not always using very specific and inevitably partial reports from within the field being covered . That there are costs in doing so is obvious -- but that it is possible to do it well , and to do it in ways that the costs are not those that mislead audiences , but rather require them to read more if they want a finer-grained appreciation of where a given piece of knowledge comes from .
我现在在琢磨科学作家们可以用来解决这个问题的各种招数——不过，我今天小发牢骚的重点是你以前在我当听众时就讲过的：科普的目的就是把科学思想传达给广大公众，通常会用到该领域内非常具体但不可避免地带有片面性的报告。这样做肯定有代价——但关键在于，完全可以做得好，而且可以让代价不至于误导观众，而是让那些想深入了解知识来源的人去读更多的东西。

That there are costs in doing so is obvious -- but that it is possible to do it well , and to do it in ways that the costs are not those that mislead audiences , but rather require them to read more if they want a finer-grained appreciation of where a given piece of knowledge comes from .
我现在在思考科学作家可以用来处理这个问题的各种技巧——但这次小型抨击的重点是你以前在我作为听众时曾经争论过的：公共科学传播的目的是向广泛的受众传达思想，通常（但不总是）使用来自所报道领域的非常具体且不可避免地具有片面性的报告。这样做会有代价，这是显而易见的——但有可能做得很好，并且以这样的方式来做，即这些代价不会误导受众，而是要求他们如果想要更细致地了解某项知识的来源的话，需要阅读更多内容。

source: I give a shit about that because not only does this erase the work that women of color are doing within racist white dominant structures , but it erases the work we are doing within our own communities . It makes it ok for men of color to dismiss the need for feminist interventions into our communities -- AND it makes it ok for white women to continue beating up women of color with the idea that showing any concern for what happens to men in our communities is ridiculous , because , see , they do n't approve of feminism !
domestication: 我真在乎这个，因为这样做不仅抹杀了有色女性在白人主导的种族主义结构中所做的努力，也抹杀了我们在自己社区里做的工作。这样就让有色男性觉得不必重视女权主义对社区的影响，也让白人女性觉得可以继续打压有色女性，认为关心我们社区里的男性是荒唐的，因为她们不认可女权主义！
foreignization: 我在乎这个，因为这不仅抹杀了有色女性在种族主义白人主导结构中的工作，还抹杀了我们在自己社区中的工作。这让有色男性认为不需要在我们的社区中进行女权干预——而且这让白人女性继续用一种观念来打压有色女性，即对我们社区中发生的事情表示任何关心都是可笑的，因为，你看，她们不赞成女权主义！

source: In 1987 , as Senate Judiciary Committee chairman , Biden led the successful Democratic effort to defeat Ronald Reagan 's archconservative Supreme Court nominee Robert Bork . That led Reagan ultimately to appoint Anthony Kennedy to the high court , where the justice has proven to be the decisive swing vote .

source: Cartographers of old produced maps that now hang in art galleries , living rooms , and libraries . They were works of art , embellished with the cartographer 's personality -- from their handwriting to the fanciful borders of the page and sometimes even sea creatures . Peruse for a moment this map of North Carolina ( then part of the Virginia Colony ) from 1636 -- the ocean comes complete with ships and large toothy fish , the land depicts the western border of our country back then ( the Appalachian mountains ) and each tribal territory is nicely color-coded . The map not only gets its message across but says something about the mapmaker . Today 's cartography looks very different .

On the other hand , he was playing third base about a third of the time as well .
另一个问题是，尽管他的臂力可能是原始的80分，但他还没有很好地发挥出来，使其成为有效的80分。他多次被发现在将球扔给第三排的观众。他在2011年犯了34次错误，2012年犯了33次。另一方面，他大约有三分之一的时间也在打三垒。

source: You are right BetsyRoss ! I am seeing that early voting is the problem . When they get those votes in no one is watching so those votes can be double counted or maybe triple counted to get the results that they need . And does anyone think that the union thugs in conjunction with the Prez would n't triple count ballots when no one is looking ? How does anyone knoe when the ballots come in , especilly the military ballots . The RNC must do something about this either give every ballot a serial number that is tamper proof , tamper proof a seal so if broken can not be reused , program machines to only one number for one ballot , or eliminate early voting all together .
domestication: 你说得对，贝琪·罗斯！我发现提前投票才是问题所在。一旦这些选票投进去，没人盯着，就可能被重复计算两次，甚至三次，以达到他们想要的结果。还有谁会相信工会的那些恶霸和总统联手时，不会在没人注意的情况下重复计票三次呢？谁能知道选票寄来的时候发生了什么，尤其是军方的选票。共和党全国委员会必须采取行动了，要么给每张选票一个防篡改的序列号，要么用防拆封条，一旦拆开就不能再用，或者编程让机器只能识别每张选票的一次编号，要不就干脆取消提前投票。

source: You 're right , so-called " industrial farming " has had a negative impact on biodiversity . This is something we 've talked about in many posts here at Biofortified . There 's been a narrowing of the number of species of crops that are planted and a narrowing of the number of varieties planted within each species . In addition , some methods used in farming decrease biodiversity on farms by killing not just pests but all insects and non-crop plants . However , this is a problem of farming , not of genetic engineering .
domestication: 你说得对，所谓的“工业农业”确实对生物多样性造成了负面影响。这在我们Biofortified的许多帖子中都有讨论过。现在种植的作物种类变少了，每种作物里的品种也减少了。此外，一些农业方法不仅杀死了害虫，还消灭了所有昆虫和非作物植物，进一步减少了农场上的生物多样性。不过，这其实是农业的问题，而不是基因工程的问题。

source: The IBEX science team compares the first and second maps to reveal whether there are time variations in the ribbon or the more distributed emissions around the ribbon . This animation fades between the first and second IBEX maps . We see that the first and second maps are relatively similar ; however , there are significant time variations as well . These time variations are forcing scientists to try to understand how the heliosphere can be changing so rapidly.Credit : IBEX Science Team/Goddard Space Flight Center - Click image to download movie
domestication: IBEX科学团队将第一张和第二张地图进行了对比，目的是发现日球层边缘带及其周围扩散的辐射是否存在时间上的变化。这个动画在第一张和第二张IBEX地图之间逐渐切换。我们看到，这两张地图总体上很相似，但也有明显的时间差异。这些变化让科学家们不得不努力理解，日球层为何能如此快速地变化。这可真是“士别三日，当刮目相看”啊！资料来源：IBEX科学团队/戈达德航天飞行中心——点击图片下载视频。

source: When participants in the Delta Dialogues arrived at the Delta Conservancy 's offices in West Sacramento , eight easels were standing around the room , with big blank sheets of paper on each . Soon , representatives of eight different interests -- fish and recreation , water users , agriculture , Delta levees , state/federal water agencies , state/federal regulatory agencies , NGOs/environmental , and local government -- were asked to pick a board and make two lists . First , name your top three needs in a plan for the Delta that includes conveyance . Second , name your three biggest concerns .
domestication: 当德尔塔对话的参与者们来到位于西萨克拉门托的德尔塔保护组织办公室时，房间里已经摆好了八块画架，每块画架上都放着一张大白纸。没过多久，来自八个不同领域的代表——鱼类和娱乐、用水户、农业、德尔塔堤坝、州/联邦水务机构、州/联邦监管机构、非政府组织/环保、地方政府——被请去选择一块画板，列出两份清单。第一份，写出你们在包含输水设施的德尔塔计划中最重要的三个需求；第二份，写下你们最大的三个顾虑。

source: " It 's just more cinema done , outside Holywood 's compartimentized system . Who knows where the next Kubrick might show up ? Perhaps there already is one doing his first steps in mumblecore . So why should anybody oppose it ? And what 's the deal with Faraci 's enemity of movies with more free form type of narratives ? Does he think that the only type of narrative that matters is where things happen by going A to B to C ? And self-indulgence ? Most art IS self-indulgent , if you chose to see it that way . I mean , look at Bethoeven , he did n't give a fuck about the nobility who up to then used musicians and composers as their private employees , Bethoeven composed for himself , and look at what he did ! He was being self-indulgence , you could say , but he create masterpieces of world music .
domestication: 这只是好莱坞体系之外的更多电影创作。谁知道下一个库布里克会在哪儿出现？或许他已经出现在呢喃核心电影里，正迈出第一步。那为什么有人要反对这种趋势呢？法拉奇对那些自由形式叙事电影的敌意又是怎么回事？他是不是觉得只有按部就班、从A到B再到C的故事才有价值？再说自我放纵，大多数艺术不都是这样吗？如果你这么看的话。贝多芬就是个例子，他对当时把他和其他音乐家、作曲家当作私有财产的贵族根本不屑一顾，贝多芬为自己而作曲，看看他都做了什么！可以说是自我放纵吧，但他创作了世界音乐的杰作。
foreignization: 这只是更多的电影制作，是在好莱坞的隔间系统之外完成的。谁知道下一个库布里克会在哪里出现？也许已经有一个在喃喃自语电影中迈出第一步的人。那么为什么有人要反对它呢？法拉奇对具有更多自由形式叙事结构的电影的敌意是怎么回事？他是不是认为唯一重要的叙事方式就是事情按A到B再到C的顺序发生？至于自我沉溺？大多数艺术都是自我沉溺的，如果你选择这么看的话。我是说，看看贝多芬，他对当时将音乐家和作曲家当作私人雇员的贵族毫不在意，贝多芬为自己而作曲，看看他做了什么！可以说他在自我沉溺，但他创作了世界音乐的杰作。

source: " Additionally , any economic value that a competitor , like Bodemer , would gain from this information is not merely from the knowledge of the flavor houses 's existence , but also from the knowledge that this flavor house was Swanel 's flavor house . The fact that the flavor house was well known in the industry does not mean that the flavor house was well known in the industry for being Swanel 's flavor house . A competitor seeking to replicate a Swanel product would be able to do so more quickly knowing which flavor house Swanel had used to develop that product . "
domestication: 此外，竞争对手，比如博德默，从这些信息中获得的经济利益，并不仅仅是因为知道了香精公司的存在，更重要的是知道这家香精公司是斯韦内尔的供应商。虽然这家香精公司在业内很有名，但这并不意味着它以是斯韦内尔的供应商而闻名。如果竞争对手想复制斯韦内尔的产品，知道了斯韦内尔用哪家香精公司来开发产品，复制的速度就会快得多。
foreignization: 另外，竞争对手（如Bodemer）从这些信息中获得的任何经济价值不仅仅来自于知道香精公司的存在，还来自于知道这家香精公司是Swanel的香精公司。即使该香精公司在行业内广为人知，也不意味着它以是Swanel的香精公司而广为人知。寻求复制Swanel产品的竞争对手在知道Swanel使用了哪家香精公司开发该产品的情况下，能够更快地实现复制。

source: Following the 2010 census , politicians " gerrymandered " our legislative districts , in a most extreme fashion , such that incumbents no longer need worry about " the consent of the governed " ( similar efforts nationwide have resulted in incumbent re-election rates of 95+% ) . By manipulating the map , squeezing and stretching voters into unnatural and contorted boundaries , they in effect chose who their voters would be ahead of time , turning on its head the most basic of democratic principles . Our government , in a very practical sense , is no longer ours , but has become theirs . This is what I mean by saying our civil covenant has been violated .
domestication: 2010年人口普查后，政客们对立法选区进行了极端的“画蛇添足”式的划分，使得在职者不再需要担心“民选之基”（全国类似操作的结果是，连任率高达95%以上）。他们通过操纵选区地图，把选民挤来拉去，划出一些不自然、扭曲的边界，实际上提前决定了自己的选民是谁，完全颠倒了民主最根本的原则。说白了，政府已经不再属于我们，而是变成了他们的工具。这就是我说我们的社会契约被破坏的意思。
foreignization: 在2010年人口普查之后，政客们以极其极端的方式“划分选区”，使得在职者不再需要担心“被统治者的同意”（类似的努力在全国范围内导致在职者连任率高达95%以上）。通过操纵地图，将选民挤压和拉伸到不自然且扭曲的边界内，他们实际上事先选择了他们的选民，这颠倒了最基本的民主原则。从非常实际的意义上讲，我们的政府不再是我们的，而是变成了他们的。这就是我所说的我们的社会契约已被侵犯的意思。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Following the 2010 census , politicians " gerrymandered " our legislative districts , in a most extreme fashion , such that incumbents no longer need worry about " the consent of the governed " ( similar efforts nationwide have resulted in incumbent re-election rates of 95+% ) . By manipulating the map , squeezing and stretching voters into unnatural and contorted boundaries , they in effect chose who their voters would be ahead of time , turning on its head the most basic of democratic principles . Our government , in a very practical sense , is no longer ours , but has become theirs . This is what I mean by saying our civil covenant has been violated .
2010年人口普查后，政客们对立法选区进行了极端的“画蛇添足”式的划分，使得在职者不再需要担心“民选之基”（全国类似操作的结果是，连任率高达95%以上）。他们通过操纵选区地图，把选民挤来拉去，划出一些不自然、扭曲的边界，实际上提前决定了自己的选民是谁，完全颠倒了民主最根本的原则。说白了，政府已经不再属于我们，而是变成了他们的工具。这就是我说我们的社会契约被破坏的意思。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Following the 2010 census , politicians " gerrymandered " our legislative districts , in a most extreme fashion , such that incumbents no longer need worry about " the consent of the governed " ( similar efforts nationwide have resulted in incumbent re-election rates of 95+% ) . By manipulating the map , squeezing and stretching voters into unnatural and contorted boundaries , they in effect chose who their voters would be ahead of time , turning on its head the most basic of democratic principles . Our government , in a very practical sense , is no longer ours , but has become theirs . This is what I mean by saying our civil covenant has been violated .
在2010年人口普查之后，政客们以极其极端的方式“划分选区”，使得在职者不再需要担心“被统治者的同意”（类似的努力在全国范围内导致在职者连任率高达95%以上）。通过操纵地图，将选民挤压和拉伸到不自然且扭曲的边界内，他们实际上事先选择了他们的选民，这颠倒了最基本的民主原则。从非常实际的意义上讲，我们的政府不再是我们的，而是变成了他们的。这就是我所说的我们的社会契约已被侵犯的意思。

source: The third method is to have other means to have community dialog -- a public meeting is just one method . There are other online forums and techniques that you can engage stakeholders in to get a balanced perspective so you do n't just have that one loud , vocal group dominating the conversation , either online or face to face .
domestication: 第三种方法是采用其他方式促进社区对话——公开会议只是其中一种。还可以利用线上论坛和其他手段来让利益相关者参与进来，这样就能听到更多的声音，不至于让某一个吵闹的群体在线上或线下主宰了整个讨论。

source: Now given the ad hoc come as you are party this was , clearly the NCA did n't give the military much heads up . So we went with what we more or less had in theater . source: In short , no . Maize has been improved for beta carotene levels using marker assisted selection but this is not possible in rice for two reasons . 1st , there was existing genetic diversity with regard to carotenoids that allowed for selection in maize and there is not in rice . 2nd , rice is polished in order to remove the fats that turn rice rancid and what little carotenoids there are exist in the aluerone and embryo not in the endosperm , but maize can be left whole with little rancidity problems .
domestication: 简单来说，不行。玉米通过标记辅助选择提高了β-胡萝卜素的含量，但大米做不到，原因有二：一是玉米在类胡萝卜素方面有遗传多样性，可以进行选择，而大米没有；二是大米要去皮去除脂肪，防止发霉变质，而那点类胡萝卜素主要存在于糊粉层和胚里，而不是在胚乳中。相比之下，玉米可以保持完整，不会有严重的变质问题。
foreignization: 简而言之，不行。玉米通过标记辅助选择提高了β-胡萝卜素含量，但在大米中不可能做到这一点，原因有二。第一，玉米在类胡萝卜素方面存在遗传多样性，允许进行选择，而大米则没有。第二，大米需要抛光以去除导致大米变质的脂肪，而少量的类胡萝卜素存在于糊粉层和胚中，而不是在胚乳中，但玉米可以保持完整而不会出现严重的变质问题。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In short , no . Maize has been improved for beta carotene levels using marker assisted selection but this is not possible in rice for two reasons . 1st , there was existing genetic diversity with regard to carotenoids that allowed for selection in maize and there is not in rice . 2nd , rice is polished in order to remove the fats that turn rice rancid and what little carotenoids there are exist in the aluerone and embryo not in the endosperm , but maize can be left whole with little rancidity problems .
简单来说，不行。玉米通过标记辅助选择提高了β-胡萝卜素的含量，但大米做不到，原因有二：一是玉米在类胡萝卜素方面有遗传多样性，可以进行选择，而大米没有；二是大米要去皮去除脂肪，防止发霉变质，而那点类胡萝卜素主要存在于糊粉层和胚里，而不是在胚乳中。相比之下，玉米可以保持完整，不会有严重的变质问题。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In short , no . Maize has been improved for beta carotene levels using marker assisted selection but this is not possible in rice for two reasons . 1st , there was existing genetic diversity with regard to carotenoids that allowed for selection in maize and there is not in rice . 2nd , rice is polished in order to remove the fats that turn rice rancid and what little carotenoids there are exist in the aluerone and embryo not in the endosperm , but maize can be left whole with little rancidity problems .
简而言之，不行。玉米通过标记辅助选择提高了β-胡萝卜素含量，但在大米中不可能做到这一点，原因有二。第一，玉米在类胡萝卜素方面存在遗传多样性，允许进行选择，而大米则没有。第二，大米需要抛光以去除导致大米变质的脂肪，而少量的类胡萝卜素存在于糊粉层和胚中，而不是在胚乳中，但玉米可以保持完整而不会出现严重的变质问题。

source: In 2012 as in 2008 and 2010 , Rasmussen has been the nation 's most prolific polling organization at the state level . Almost every day Rasmussen produces two or three new polls of key battleground states in the presidential election along with their national tracking poll . But in addition to being the nation 's most prolific pollster , Rasmussen gets a lot of attention , especially from conservative media outlets and pundits , because its polls consistently produce results more favorable to Republican candidates than the overall averages -- results that frequently do n't match the actual election results very well . In 2010 , for example , Nate Silver rated Rasmussen as the least accurate and most biased of all polling organizations that conducted a large number of state polls .
domestication: 2012年，就像2008年和2010年一样，拉斯穆森是全美最活跃的州级民调机构。几乎每天，拉斯穆森都会发布两到三个关于总统大选关键摇摆州的新民调，外加他们的全国追踪民调。除了是最活跃的民调机构，拉斯穆森还受到很多关注，尤其是保守媒体和评论员的关注，因为他们的民调结果往往对共和党候选人更有利，而且这些结果通常与实际选举结果相差甚远。比如在2010年，内特·西尔弗就将拉斯穆森评为所有进行大量州级民调的机构中最不准确、偏见最大的一家。

In 2012 as in 2008 and 2010 , Rasmussen has been the nation 's most prolific polling organization at the state level . Almost every day Rasmussen produces two or three new polls of key battleground states in the presidential election along with their national tracking poll . But in addition to being the nation 's most prolific pollster , Rasmussen gets a lot of attention , especially from conservative media outlets and pundits , because its polls consistently produce results more favorable to Republican candidates than the overall averages -- results that frequently do n't match the actual election results very well . In 2010 , for example , Nate Silver rated Rasmussen as the least accurate and most biased of all polling organizations that conducted a large number of state polls .

source: Then there was the family with teenage children and an old Labrador who had been holidaying here for years and had recently discovered their beloved dog was dying of cancer . This weekend was the last holiday for this old dog and the family delighted in watching him run along the beach he had always loved and playing in the long grasses surrounding the cottage . It was bittersweet , the family unsure they would ever be able to return to this little town without their dog .
domestication: 后来，有一家子，孩子都到了青春期，还养了一只老拉布拉多，他们在这儿度假已经好几年了。最近，他们发现心爱的狗得了癌症，时日无多。这个周末是这只老狗最后一次度假了，全家人都特别高兴能看着它在常去的海滩上奔跑，在小屋周围的长草丛中嬉戏。真是甜中带苦啊，这家人担心以后再也无法带着他们的狗回到这个小镇，不知道没有了狗，他们还能不能再来这里。

source: But let 's not forget -- " appropriation " is not the big picture . It was the fallback position when the accusation of stealing was disproven . It was the third or fourth position the goal posts were moved to . I can see that the big picture arguments are compelling intellectually . But in this case , they were grafted on as an excuse to continue an attack on someone who was dehumanized so she could be scapegoated .
domestication: 但别忘了——“挪用”并不是事情的全部。这只不过是当偷窃的指控被驳倒后，退而求其次的说法。其实这已经是论点转移后的第三或第四个版本了。我能理解那些宏观论点在理论上很有说服力。但在这件事上，这些论点不过是找个借口，继续攻击一个已经被妖魔化的人，把她当成替罪羊罢了。
foreignization: 但是不要忘了 -- “挪用”并不是大局。当偷窃的指控被证伪时，它成了退而求其次的位置。它是目标柱被移动到的第三或第四个位置。我可以看出大局论点在智力上是令人信服的。但在这种情况下，它们是作为继续攻击某人的借口而嫁接上的，此人被非人化了，以便可以被当作替罪羊。

source: The human skeleton is remarkably adaptive . The skeleton responds to physical exertion by strengthening the bones ( in physiology , this is called " Wolff 's law of bone ) . Over time , the bones will adjust to increased physical activity by strengthening , both in width and in material ( the increase of certain minerals in the skeleton can make the bones stronger ) , and by restructuring the architecture of the spongy bone ( porous bone matter at the end of long bones , like the femur ) along the lines of mechanical stress . This improves the bones ' ability to withstand the extra force exerted upon them through heavy physical activity .
domestication: 人的骨骼非常适应能力强。根据生理学上的“沃尔夫定律”，骨骼会在身体活动后变得更强壮。时间久了，骨骼会通过变宽和增加骨密度（比如骨骼中某些矿物质的增加会让骨头更结实）来适应更多的体力活动。此外，骨骼还会重新构建松质骨（长骨末端如股骨的多孔骨质）的结构，沿着机械应力线进行调整。这样一来，骨头就能更好地承受高强度体力活动带来的额外力量。
foreignization: 人类的骨骼具有惊人的适应性。骨骼通过增强骨头来响应体力活动（在生理学中，这被称为“沃尔夫的骨定律”）。随着时间的推移，骨骼会通过增强来适应增加的体力活动，既增加宽度也在材料上（骨骼中某些矿物质的增加可以使骨头更强壮），并通过沿机械应力线重新构建海绵骨（长骨末端的多孔骨质，如股骨）的结构。这提高了骨骼承受因剧烈体力活动而施加在其上的额外力的能力。

This improves the bones ' ability to withstand the extra force exerted upon them through heavy physical activity .

source: All one needs to do is point out that mumblecore as a genre has existed for years and produced nothing that has impacted the genre except its own invention , in perfect keeping with the hipster element of celebrating the hipster element for its own sake and contributing nothing else . Has there been ONE great mumblecore performance ? ONE great mumblecore piece of dialogue ? ONE great mumblecore film ? No . No . No . That should have been Faraci 's argument - that mumblecore proves its own irrelevance by producing absolute nothing .
domestication: 要说啥呢，低语核心这东西存在了好多年，除了它自己的发明外，对整个类型没啥影响，完全符合那些嬉皮士自娱自乐的调调，除了庆祝自己啥也不贡献。有哪一部低语核心电影的表演是绝了的？有哪一段低语核心的对话是经典的？有哪一部低语核心的电影是牛的？没有，没有，还是没有。法拉奇本该这么反驳——低语核心靠啥证明自己无关紧要？就因为它啥也没留下。

All one needs to do is point out that mumblecore as a genre has existed for years and produced nothing that has impacted the genre except its own invention , in perfect keeping with the hipster element of celebrating the hipster element for its own sake and contributing nothing else . Has there been ONE great mumblecore performance ? ONE great mumblecore piece of dialogue ? ONE great mumblecore film ? No . No . No . That should have been Faraci 's argument - that mumblecore proves its own irrelevance by producing absolute nothing .
要说啥呢，低语核心这东西存在了好多年，除了它自己的发明外，对整个类型没啥影响，完全符合那些嬉皮士自娱自乐的调调，除了庆祝自己啥也不贡献。有哪一部低语核心电影的表演是绝了的？有哪一段低语核心的对话是经典的？有哪一部低语核心的电影是牛的？没有，没有，还是没有。法拉奇本该这么反驳——低语核心靠啥证明自己无关紧要？就因为它啥也没留下。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

All one needs to do is point out that mumblecore as a genre has existed for years and produced nothing that has impacted the genre except its own invention , in perfect keeping with the hipster element of celebrating the hipster element for its own sake and contributing nothing else . Has there been ONE great mumblecore performance ? ONE great mumblecore piece of dialogue ? ONE great mumblecore film ? No . No . No . That should have been Faraci 's argument - that mumblecore proves its own irrelevance by producing absolute nothing .

所需要做的就是指出，作为一类的mumblecore已经存在了多年，除了其自身的发明外，对这一类别的影响一无所有，这完全符合hipster元素为了其自身而庆祝hipster元素的特点，并且没有其他贡献。有没有一场伟大的mumblecore表演？一段伟大的mumblecore对话？一部伟大的mumblecore电影？没有。没有。没有。这本应该是Faraci的论点——mumblecore通过产生绝对的虚无证明了自身的无关紧要。

source: It 's quite a panel . Rep. Randy Neugebauer ( R-Texas ) , who drafted a resolution for Americans to " join together in prayer to humbly seek fair weather conditions " after a series of destructive tornados and droughts , is also on the House Science Committee , as is Rep. Dana Rohrabacher ( R-Calif. ) , who suggested " dinosaur flatulence " may have caused climate change 55 million years ago .

source: Our economy is defined by greed . The top 1 percent of earners take home a quarter of income in this country . Wall Street banks are logging record profits while the Treasury Department professes helplessness at the fact that tens of millions of people are still losing their homes to those banks . Because of that foreclosure crisis , the stunning racial wealth gap -- the typical black family has a dime for a dollar of wealth held by its white counterpart -- will surely grow worse . The White House is paralyzed with inaction in the face of all of these challenges . But it can kill , so we are great .
domestication: 我们的经济被贪婪定义。最富有的1%的人拿走了这个国家四分之一的收入。华尔街的银行赚得盆满钵满，而财政部却对数千万人因这些银行而失去家园无能为力。由于这场房屋止赎危机，惊人的种族财富差距——普通黑人家庭的财富仅为白人家庭的十分之一——肯定会进一步恶化。白宫面对这些挑战毫无作为，但只要能打击对手，我们就算是成功了。
foreignization: 我们的经济由贪婪定义。收入最高的1%的人群拿走了这个国家四分之一的收入。华尔街的银行正在记录创纪录的利润，而财政部却对数千万人仍在因这些银行而失去家园的事实表示无能为力。由于这场止赎危机，惊人的种族财富差距——普通黑人家庭拥有的财富仅为白人家庭的十分之一——肯定会变得更加严重。面对所有这些挑战，白宫束手无策。但我们可以杀人，所以我们很强大。

Our economy is defined by greed . The top 1 percent of earners take home a quarter of income in this country . Wall Street banks are logging record profits while the Treasury Department professes helplessness at the fact that tens of millions of people are still losing their homes to those banks . Because of that foreclosure crisis , the stunning racial wealth gap -- the typical black family has a dime for a dollar of wealth held by its white counterpart -- will surely grow worse . The White House is paralyzed with inaction in the face of all of these challenges . But it can kill , so we are great .

source: But I think I 'm one of the few . Which brings me to the question of why is questioning stories or asking for more information before saying , " This is fact ( or at least a widely accepted theorem ) . " the minority ? Is n't that the scientific method ? Scientists ( whether they are physicists or sociologists ) do n't conduct one study , see the results and think that one study 's results are the end-all-be-all of any issue . They know it is just the beginning to another series of questions .
domestication: 但我认为我是少数派。这就引出了一个问题：为什么在说“这是事实（或者至少是一个被广泛接受的理论）”之前，质疑故事或要求提供更多信息的人会是少数呢？这不就是科学方法吗？科学家们，无论是物理学家还是社会学家，都不会只做一次研究，看到结果就认为这个问题已经盖棺定论了。他们知道，这只是通向另一系列问题的开始。
foreignization: 但是我认为我是少数人之一。这让我想到了一个问题：为什么在说“这是事实（或者至少是一个被广泛接受的理论）”之前，质疑故事或要求提供更多信息的人是少数？这不是科学方法吗？科学家（无论是物理学家还是社会学家）不会进行一项研究，看到结果后就认为这项研究的结果是一切问题的最终答案。他们知道这只是另一个问题系列的开始。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But I think I 'm one of the few . Which brings me to the question of why is questioning stories or asking for more information before saying , " This is fact ( or at least a widely accepted theorem ) . " the minority ? Is n't that the scientific method ? Scientists ( whether they are physicists or sociologists ) do n't conduct one study , see the results and think that one study 's results are the end-all-be-all of any issue . They know it is just the beginning to another series of questions .
但我认为我是少数派。这就引出了一个问题：为什么在说“这是事实（或者至少是一个被广泛接受的理论）”之前，质疑故事或要求提供更多信息的人会是少数呢？这不就是科学方法吗？科学家们，无论是物理学家还是社会学家，都不会只做一次研究，看到结果就认为这个问题已经盖棺定论了。他们知道，这只是通向另一系列问题的开始。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But I think I 'm one of the few . Which brings me to the question of why is questioning stories or asking for more information before saying , " This is fact ( or at least a widely accepted theorem ) . " the minority ? Is n't that the scientific method ? Scientists ( whether they are physicists or sociologists ) do n't conduct one study , see the results and think that one study 's results are the end-all-be-all of any issue . They know it is just the beginning to another series of questions .
但是我认为我是少数人之一。这让我想到了一个问题：为什么在说“这是事实（或者至少是一个被广泛接受的理论）”之前，质疑故事或要求提供更多信息的人是少数？这不是科学方法吗？科学家（无论是物理学家还是社会学家）不会进行一项研究，看到结果后就认为这项研究的结果是一切问题的最终答案。他们知道这只是另一个问题系列的开始。

source: We should call a time out at this point and ask for a reality check . This will never happen because the capital keeps flowing and the promoters continue drilling and leasing . source: If you 're serious about getting back on the bike then you need to instil some discipline into your training regime . If you have a busy life juggling a job and a family , then it 's crucial that a lack of time does not prove to be an insurmountable barrier to cycling again . A regime such as the 12-Week Winter Training Program could be a perfect fit for your immediate ambitions .  Socialise : join your old club

source: A few years ago , I was able to take 15 days off or so and leave with my sister to South Africa which turned out to be an incredible adventure in so many different ways . I wish I could explain how it felt ! ! I spent the first half of my trip in the Kruger National Park ( South Africa 's biggest ) for a 4 day safari where I saw an incredible number of animals . I did find a few of my good pictures but there are so many more . It 's really quite a feeling to be standing a few feet away from these incredible animals and I truly hope that anyone wishing to see this in person will get the opportunity ! : )
domestication: 几年前，我有机会休了大概15天假，和我妹妹一起去南非玩，这真是一次不可思议的冒险。那种感觉真的难以言表！前半程，我在克鲁格国家公园——南非最大的国家公园——待了四天，体验了一次难忘的野生动物园之旅，看到了数不胜数的动物。我找出了几张不错的照片，但其实还有更多没放上来。站在这些令人惊叹的动物面前，那感觉真是太棒了，真心希望每一个想亲眼见证这一切的人，都能如愿以偿！
foreignization: 几年前，我能够休大约15天的假，和我的姐姐去了南非，这证明是一次在很多方面都非常不可思议的冒险。我真希望我能解释那是怎样的感觉！！我在克鲁格国家公园（南非最大的国家公园）度过了旅程的前半部分，进行了为期4天的游猎，在那里我看到了难以置信数量的动物。我找到了几张不错的照片，但实际上还有很多更多。站在这些令人惊叹的动物几英尺之外真的是一种很特别的感觉，我真心希望所有希望亲眼见到这一幕的人能有机会实现！：）

source: You make a dubious statement about the ineffectiveness of JDAM thus the ineffectiveness of the F-22 . We challenged your statement and called for you to prove your claims . You state that your claims are based off of articles that are readily available online , yet still did not cite any publications . When pressed further you spout off random publications without directly citing any specific articles . I then took the time to search those publications you cited and found nothing to back up your original statement .

source: The exchange of ideas in Gainesville was not one-sided . Mullen asked McDaniels about how to protect the quarterback so he could throw deeper downfield . At that point , Chris Leak , then the Gators ? starter , was throwing short or intermediate routes , from 8 to 15 yards . When Tebow arrived in 2006 , he had a booming arm , and the Gators began to throw longer passes . Tebow ? s accuracy has been a source of criticism in the N.F.L. , but he completed 66.4 percent of his passes in college and as a senior averaged 13.6 yards per completion .
domestication: 盖恩斯维尔的思想交流不是单向的。马伦向麦丹尼尔请教如何保护四分卫，好让他能更远地传球。当时，克里斯·利克是佛罗里达队的首发四分卫，他通常传的是短距离或中距离的路线，大约8到15码。2006年特伯来到后，他有着强大的臂力，佛罗里达队开始传更长的球。虽然特伯在N.F.L.的准确性常受批评，但在大学时，他的传球完成率达到了66.4%，大四那年平均每传一次球就能推进13.6码。
foreignization: 盖恩斯维尔的思想交流并不是单方面的。穆伦问麦丹尼尔斯如何保护四分卫以便他可以更深地传球。在那时，克里斯·莱克，当时是佛罗里达短吻鳄队的首发球员，正在传短距离或中距离的路线，从8到15码。当蒂博在2006年到来时，他有一个强劲的手臂，佛罗里达短吻鳄队开始传更长的球。蒂博的准确性在N.F.L.中一直是受到批评的来源，但在大学期间他完成了66.4%的传球，大四时平均每完成一次传球达到13.6码。

source: Over time , he has worked as a paperboy , musician , elevator operator , shipping clerk , soldier , teletype operator , bartender , janitor , advertising agency owner , custom picture frame and salesman , and for the last few years as a technical writer for Fortune 500 companies . source: Agreed . Those movies are full of missed opportunities , miscasting and lack a certain something - I think the sense of fun and adventure that permeates the other Marvel movies . source: Public fears about wireless smart meters are well-founded . They are backed by various medical authorities such as the Public Health Departments of Santa Cruz County ( California ) and of Salzburg State ( Austria ) . These authorities are worried about the growing number of citizens who say they have developed electrohypersensitivity ( EHS ) , especially since for many of them , the symptoms developed after the installation of such meters ( it takes some time for most people to link the two events ) .
domestication: 公众对无线智能电表的担忧并非空穴来风。这种担忧得到了圣克鲁斯县（加利福尼亚州）和萨尔茨堡州（奥地利）公共卫生部门等医疗权威的支持。这些权威部门担心越来越多的市民声称自己患上了电磁敏感症（EHS），尤其是在安装了这类电表之后，很多人出现了症状（大多数人需要一段时间才能将症状与电表联系起来）。
foreignization: 公众对无线智能电表的担忧是有根据的。这些担忧得到了加利福尼亚州圣克鲁斯县和奥地利萨尔茨堡州公共卫生部门等各类医疗权威的支持。这些权威机构担心越来越多的市民表示他们已经发展出电磁超敏反应（EHS），尤其是在安装此类电表后，许多人的症状开始出现（大多数人需要一段时间才能将这两者联系起来）。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Public fears about wireless smart meters are well-founded . They are backed by various medical authorities such as the Public Health Departments of Santa Cruz County ( California ) and of Salzburg State ( Austria ) . These authorities are worried about the growing number of citizens who say they have developed electrohypersensitivity ( EHS ) , especially since for many of them , the symptoms developed after the installation of such meters ( it takes some time for most people to link the two events ) .
公众对无线智能电表的担忧并非空穴来风。这种担忧得到了圣克鲁斯县（加利福尼亚州）和萨尔茨堡州（奥地利）公共卫生部门等医疗权威的支持。这些权威部门担心越来越多的市民声称自己患上了电磁敏感症（EHS），尤其是在安装了这类电表之后，很多人出现了症状（大多数人需要一段时间才能将症状与电表联系起来）。

source: Some folks ( men and women ) do get a bit obsessive about cleanliness and neatness . Sadly this discourages a lot of folks from even trying . You do n't need a home that 's so spotless it could be photographed for a magazine and you do n't have to look as if your house is ready for a dinner party at a moment 's notice . But there 's a wide space between that and pigsty .
domestication: 有些人，不论男女，对干净整洁真是到了痴迷的地步。这可苦了那些本来还想努力一把的人，直接就被吓退了。其实啊，你家不用干净到能上杂志封面，也不用随时都准备好迎接晚宴客人。但话说回来，乱得跟猪圈似的也不行。

source: Hotel owner Perry Patel cut the ribbon to formally open the hotel Wednesday with a coterie of city officials . He said that Santa Cruz was known as a hard place to do business , but it did n't prove so for him . His family-owned business , BPR Properties based in Palo Alto , adds a new hotel a year . The acronym is for B.B. , his father , Perry and Rita , his sister .

The acronym is for B.B. , his father , Perry and Rita , his sister .

source: Yes , sending articles does work . I ca n't tell you how much of a good impression it makes . Even if they do n't read it , the difference is you tried to add value . source: Only Microsoft is both building a global scale public cloud platform and enabling private clouds to blossom ( with Windows Sever and System Center ) and only Microsoft offers customers the flexibility to choose how/where they want to run their cloud applications . Microsoft 's private cloud solutions benefit from the feedback loop of delivering our cloud services at massive scale and applying those learnings to our on-premises products . Brad Anderson published a blog post that describes how public and private clouds come together .

source: Summum , a religious organization , sent a letter to the mayor of Pleasant Grove , Utah asking to place a monument in one of the city 's parks . Although the park already housed a monument to the Ten Commandments , the mayor denied Summum 's request because the monument did not " directly relate to the history of Pleasant Grove . " Summum filed suit against the city in federal court citing , among other things , a violation of its First Amendment free speech rights . The U.S. District Court for the District of Utah denied Summum 's request for a preliminary injunction .
domestication: 最高神教，一个宗教团体，给犹他州普莱森特格罗夫市的市长写了一封信，要求在市里的一个公园里安置一座纪念碑。虽然这个公园已经有了十诫的纪念碑，但市长还是拒绝了最高神教的请求，理由是这座新纪念碑与“普莱森特格罗夫的历史没有直接关系”。最高神教一气之下把市政府告上了联邦法院，控诉自己的言论自由受到了侵害。结果，犹他州的联邦地区法院驳回了最高神教要求初步禁令的请求。
foreignization: Summum，一个宗教组织，向犹他州普莱森特格罗夫市的市长发送了一封信，要求在该市的一个公园内放置一座纪念碑。尽管该公园已经有一座十诫的纪念碑，但市长拒绝了Summum的请求，因为该纪念碑没有“直接与普莱森特格罗夫的历史相关。”Summum在联邦法院对城市提起了诉讼，指控包括违反其第一修正案言论自由权在内的多项内容。美国犹他州地区法院驳回了Summum要求初步禁令的请求。

" Summum filed suit against the city in federal court citing , among other things , a violation of its First Amendment free speech rights . The U.S. District Court for the District of Utah denied Summum 's request for a preliminary injunction .

source: Uh ... Ever hear of a fellow named Isaac Newton ? Cotton Mather ? James Parkinson ? Jean Deluc ? All men of science , and yet all men of God who believed in young earth creationism . I bet you never heard of Benjamin barton eh ? The botanist who was also a young earth creationist ? Look up John Kidd -- the founder of most modern uses for coal and so called fossil fuels -- another creationist .

source: Even outside Austin in Round Rock where my dad work as a high school teacher they 're pretty spread out . You 'll often finding them living where ever . source: Now we live in a time when Democrats have shifted the force of their Cult of Death and their macabre reign of power to the most innocent and defenseless in our society . source: Another type of bad content on social media is the kind that overly promotes the brand 's latest offerings . source: While I do admit that I do have some mental issues , I really do n't want people bringing them up for every aspect of my life . I do n't go to some people 's houses for the very good reason of JUST BECAUSE . Not because I 'm terrified of talking to people , not because if I leave the safety of my bedroom I will catch SARS . JUST BECAUSE ! I still want to use my mental disorders as an excuse for my sometimes bizarre behavior , but please , please , PLEASE , do n't use them against me .
domestication: 虽然我承认自己确实有些心理问题，但我真的不希望这些事情成为生活中方方面面的话题。不去某些人家里，我自有我的道理，就是“因为”嘛。不是因为我害怕跟人说话，也不是说一离开我那安全的小屋就会染上什么非典。就是“因为”！我仍然想拿我的心理问题当借口，来解释我有时怪异的行为，但拜托，拜托，千万拜托，别拿这些问题来针对我。
foreignization: 虽然我承认我确实有一些心理问题，我真的不希望人们在我的生活各个方面都提到它们。我不去某些人的家，原因很简单，就是仅仅因为。并不是因为我害怕与人交谈，也不是因为如果我离开我卧室的安全地带我会染上SARS。仅仅因为！我还是想用我的心理障碍作为我有时古怪行为的借口，但请，请，拜托了，不要用它们来对付我。

JUST BECAUSE ! I still want to use my mental disorders as an excuse for my sometimes bizarre behavior , but please , please , PLEASE , do n't use them against me .

source: Really John ? There is a clear evolutionary relationship between HIV and simian viruses , viruses can jump species from time to time , quite often with catastrophic results ( lack of coevolutionary arms races between host and vector for instance ) -- HIV quite obviously falls into this category -- wild claims that it is engineered are quite frankly ridiculous .
domestication: 真的吗，约翰？HIV和猴病毒之间有明显的进化关系，病毒时不时会跨物种传播，往往带来灾难性后果——比如宿主和病毒之间的协同进化军备竞赛缺失——HIV显然属于这种情况。说它是人为制造的，简直就是无稽之谈。
foreignization: 真的吗，约翰？HIV和猿猴病毒之间存在明显的进化关系，病毒时不时会跨越物种传播，通常会导致灾难性的后果（例如，宿主和载体之间缺乏协同进化的军备竞赛）-- HIV显然属于这一类--声称它是人为制造的简直就是荒谬。

source: These subsidies enable megabanks to borrow more cheaply and grab market share relative to smaller banks ( those with less than $10 billion of assets . ) On top of this , and working closely with the biggest banks , Visa and MasterCard have around 90 percent of the market for debit cards -- hardly conducive to reasonable competitive outcomes .

为此，罗姆尼竞选团队在周四推出了一批知名商界领袖，他们支持这位共和党总统候选人。支持者包括查尔斯·施瓦布、思科首席执行官约翰·钱伯斯和家得宝联合创始人伯尼·马库斯。名单上的最新名字是英特尔首席执行官保罗·奥特里尼，他是巴拉克·奥巴马总统的就业与竞争力委员会成员。

source: Thought experiments and analogies ride to rescue here . Consider the following scenario : Shortly after Barack Obama 's exit from the presidency in 2016 ( or , rather , Jan. 2017 ) the world is struck by a gigantic meteor that wipes out all of human civilisation . This has the curious effect of making Barack Obama the penultimate president of the United States . In other words , it adds a property to the pre-2017 presidency that was n't there before . But this does n't require any spooky backwards causation . Why could n't posthumous harms be the same ? In other words , why could n't attaching the properties of harm and benefit to the ante-mortem person be like attaching the property of " penultimacy " to the president ?
domestication: 思想实验和类比在这里派上用场了。想象这样一个场景：2016年，也就是2017年1月，巴拉克·奥巴马刚刚卸任美国总统，地球突然被一颗巨大的陨石撞击，导致整个人类文明毁灭。这奇怪地使得巴拉克·奥巴马成了美国倒数第二位总统。换句话说，这件事给2017年前的总统任期增加了一个之前不存在的新属性。但这并不需要什么神秘的逆向因果关系。那么，为什么死后的伤害不可以是同样的道理呢？也就是说，为什么不能像给总统加上“倒数第二”的属性一样，给生前的人加上伤害或利益的属性呢？
foreignization: 思想实验和类比在这里派上用场。考虑以下情景：在巴拉克·奥巴马于2016年（或者说，2017年1月）卸任总统后不久，世界遭到一颗巨大的陨石撞击，导致整个人类文明被毁灭。这产生了一个奇怪的效果，使巴拉克·奥巴马成为美国倒数第二任总统。换句话说，它给2017年前的总统职位增加了一个之前没有的属性。但这并不需要任何神秘的逆向因果关系。为什么死后伤害不能是同样的道理呢？换句话说，为什么不能将伤害和利益的属性附加到死者生前的人身上，就像将“倒数第二”的属性附加到总统身上一样呢？

But this does n't require any spooky backwards causation . Why could n't posthumous harms be the same ? In other words , why could n't attaching the properties of harm and benefit to the ante-mortem person be like attaching the property of " penultimacy " to the president ?

source: Basically , if there is actual evidence of criminal activity backing up a " suspicion , " then it should be acted upon . If there is no evidence of criminal activity backing up a " suspicion , " then the lack of evidence should suffice to guarantee the treatment of persons as innocents . In neither case should " suspicion " itself be in any way a criterion for any kind of action by police .  Steve Bock
domestication: 基本上，如果有确凿的犯罪证据支持“怀疑”，那就应该采取行动。如果没有证据支持这个“怀疑”，那么没有证据本身就足以保证把人当作无罪处理。在任何情况下，“怀疑”本身都不应该成为警方采取任何行动的标准。史蒂夫·博克

source: It 's the World Bank Annuals in Tokyo ; not normally an event to get the pulse racing . However , even though it sounds a bit grey , it 's majorly exciting to us GROW campaigners . We 're taking our campaign to stop land grabs right to the heart of the World Bank . Bank staff , Directors and their new President Jim Kim are here to talk about their priorities in helping the world 's poorest people . And as you might have seen in our brilliant Thunderclap earlier this week we 're asking the World Bank to make a crucial step in sorting hunger and food prices .
domestication: 这是在东京举行的世界银行年会，通常来说，这并不是一个能让人热血沸腾的活动。不过，虽然听起来有点枯燥，但对我们这些GROW运动的支持者来说，却是个超级令人兴奋的时刻。我们要把反对土地掠夺的活动带到世界银行的核心地带。银行工作人员、董事们以及新任行长金墉都在这里，讨论他们帮助世界上最贫困人口的重点工作。正如你可能在本周早些时候看到的我们那精彩的雷霆一击中所呼吁的那样，我们要求世界银行迈出关键一步，解决饥饿和食品价格问题。

source: The newest numbers show that California 's three investor-owned utilities ( IOUs ) were at 20.6 percent renewables at the end of 2011 . With approximately 17 percent at the end of 2010 , they fell somewhat short of meeting the state 's 2002 mandate that they obtain 20 percent of their power from renewables by the end of 2010 .
domestication: 最新数据显示，截至2011年底，加利福尼亚州的三大私营电力公司（IOUs）的可再生能源比例达到了20.6%。而2010年底这个数字大约是17%，没能完全达到2002年州政府要求的到2010年底可再生能源占比要达到20%的目标。这目标虽没一步到位，但进步还是有的，也算是差强人意了。

source: Please address what the outcome would be if we replaced " hybrid " or really any other tool that breeders use instead of GMO in the above comment . source: kai , your English is terrible . " It rather amuses me " is perfectly fine . " Pronomina " is n't even an English word -- it 's Latin . The word you seem to be looking for is " pronouns " . Oh , and " grammatical troubles " is incorrect -- it should probably be " grammatical trouble " , but even that is a clumsy construction which no native speaker would ever use in this context . You also seem to have some sort of problem with capitalisation .
domestication: 凯，你的英语真是一塌糊涂。说“这让我觉得挺好玩的”就挺好。“Pronomina”根本不是英语单词，这是拉丁语，你想要表达的应该是“代词”。还有，“语法问题”这个词组用得不对，应该改成“语法问题”，但即便这样，听起来还是别扭，母语者绝不会这么用。你对大写也有点混乱。

source: With broken and unethical global social mores , this is considered standard business practice : to deceive customers , while gaining enormous profits . As long as a " revolving-door " policy remains between corporations and no longer public agencies , citizens will not have their medically validated concerns ever addressed . The corporate bottom line , profit , is what counts -- not our well-being and safety . Further , the synergistic effects of various wireless technologies combined with other environmental toxins to which we all are exposed daily have not been tested .
domestication: 世道人心不古，现在欺骗顾客、牟取暴利已经成了司空见惯的生意经。只要商界和所谓的公共机构之间还有“旋转门”，老百姓的健康诉求就永远得不到重视。对企业来说，利润才是王道，管你健康不健康、安全不安全。再者，各种无线技术叠加起来，再加上我们每天接触的各种环境毒素，这些综合影响根本就没经过测试。
foreignization: 在全球社会道德规范破裂和不道德的情况下，这种欺骗客户以获得巨大利润的行为被视为标准的商业做法。只要企业与不再公开的机构之间存在“旋转门”政策，公民们经过医学验证的担忧将永远不会得到解决。企业的最终目标——利润——才是最重要的——而不是我们的健康和安全。此外，各种无线技术的协同效应与其他我们每天都会接触的环境毒素相结合的影响尚未进行测试。

With broken and unethical global social mores , this is considered standard business practice : to deceive customers , while gaining enormous profits . As long as a " revolving-door " policy remains between corporations and no longer public agencies , citizens will not have their medically validated concerns ever addressed . The corporate bottom line , profit , is what counts -- not our well-being and safety . Further , the synergistic effects of various wireless technologies combined with other environmental toxins to which we all are exposed daily have not been tested .

source: Deborah ... I receive zero government aid ... never have . I am gainfully employed ... with the same employer for 25 years . In fact ... I am financially far better off than I was 4 years ago . I have just purchased a new car with green backs ... my partner bought a new one earlier this year ... and we are vacationing in Barbados over the holidays . I am buying my partner a month at a spa in Arizona for the holidays . So how are you doin ' B**** ? Oh ... BTW ... do not answer ... I do not care oh pathetic one .
domestication: 黛博拉……我从未拿过政府的一分钱救济，一直都是自食其力。在同一家公司干了25年了，收入比四年前还要好得多。最近刚全款买了一辆新车，我伴侣年初也买了辆新的。假期我们还去巴巴多斯度假。我还给伴侣订了一个月的亚利桑那水疗。你说我过得咋样？哦，对了，别回我，我可不想听你那可怜巴巴的回答。

source: As I sat in my cell trying not to think about my full bladder , they brought another man in . I wondered if he had been on the plane as well . Were they going to bring everyone in or had they just singled us out ? He spoke belligerently , and I could n't understand much of what he was saying . But I did hear two officers talking about the man who stole a $3,000 watch at the security checkpoint . Now there 's a real crime . What was I doing here ?
domestication: 我坐在牢房里，尽量不去想憋尿的难受，这时他们又带进来一个人。我在想他是不是也坐了那趟飞机。他们是要把所有人都抓起来，还是只挑了我们几个？那人一脸的不高兴，说的话我也听不懂多少。不过我倒是听到两个警官在说，有个家伙在安检口偷了一块三千美元的手表。这才是真犯罪呢。我在这儿干啥呢？
foreignization: 当我坐在牢房里尽量不去想我那胀得满满的膀胱时，他们带进来了另一个人。我在想他是否也在那架飞机上。他们是要把所有人都带进来，还是只挑了我们几个？他说话咄咄逼人，我听不懂他说的大部分内容。但我确实听到两名警官在谈论那个在安检口偷了价值3000美元手表的人。这才是真正的犯罪。我在这里做什么？

source: The next day I told people at work about what happened ... oh , did I mention I " worked " for the police department at the time ? Come to find out , the gal was the daughter of the Vice Captain and that was his grand-daughter living there ! We also discovered a warrant for him for Assault -- of an 82 year old grandmother -- so I was hoping he 'd screw up again .
domestication: 第二天，我把这事儿跟单位的同事说了……哦，忘了提了，那时候我在警局工作呢。结果一查，那女的是副队长的女儿，住那儿的小孩是她的外孙女！后来还发现他身上有攻击一位82岁老太太的通缉令，我就希望他能再犯一次。

Come to find out , the gal was the daughter of the Vice Captain and that was his grand-daughter living there ! We also discovered a warrant for him for Assault -- of an 82 year old grandmother -- so I was hoping he 'd screw up again .
第二天我告诉了单位的同事这件事……哦，我提到过当时我在警察局“工作”吗？后来发现，那个女人是副队长的女儿，而住在那里的是他的孙女！我们还发现对他有一张袭击令——受害者是一位82岁的老太太——所以我希望他能再犯错。

source: My start in writing came because of a mentor . A college drop out I did n't have the " training " but I met up with a lifelong newsie with ink in his veins . I spent a grueling year writing for Gene 's " hobby paper " a community pub he founded because retirement " bored him . " Each successive column was dissected , winnowed and restructured until Gene was happy . Fourteen years later I feed , clothe and house my family putting to work the same principles I learned from Gene .
domestication: 我走上写作这条路，全靠一位恩师的指引。虽然我是大学肄业，没受过什么“正规训练”，但遇到了一个血液里都流淌着新闻热血的老记者。我在吉恩创办的“业余报纸”——社区刊物上写了一年，这对他来说是打发退休无聊生活的消遣。每一篇专栏文章都要被他拆解、精简、重组，直到他满意为止。十四年后，我靠这些从吉恩那里学来的原则养家糊口，衣食无忧。

source: Amanda , I still think you 're the bees knees . A lot of these bloggers who look up to BFP and think that you stole her work ( or whatever ) are n't being entirely fair , but their coming from a cultural context that privileges you . Their feelings and sensibilities are offended . You may not feel it 's fair that someone is asking you to walk and talk a little more softly in this context ( I know what all this negative attention feels like ) , but things you say to me are going to sound different to them . That 's just how it works .
domestication: 阿曼达，我觉得你还是最棒的。这些博主们老是仰视BFP，觉得你抄袭了她的作品（或者其他什么的），其实他们有点不公平，但也是因为他们来自一个以你为中心的文化背景。他们的感情和敏感点被触碰到了。你可能觉得有人要求你在这种情况下低调点、温柔点说话不太公平（我明白负面关注的感觉有多难受），但你对我说的话，在他们听来就是不一样。这就是现实。

source: There is just so much LOVE in this post ! ( I think a lot of it is harnessed in those twinkly lights ) . Everything here looks like it would warm my belly and my soul . source: The media and the right-wing have been calling these tax increases and budget cuts a ' fiscal cliff ' to scare people into supporting extension of tax cuts for the rich and restoring spending on the military . While it is true that if all the spending cuts and tax increases continue for a number of months that the economy will fall back into a recession , there is no ' cliff ' that the economy will fall off in January .
domestication: 媒体和右翼势力把这些增税和预算削减称为“财政悬崖”，目的就是吓唬大家，好让富人的减税政策继续延长，同时恢复军费开支。确实，如果这些削减支出和增税措施持续几个月，经济可能会重新陷入衰退。但其实并不存在什么“悬崖”，经济不会在1月份突然跌下深渊。
foreignization: 媒体和右翼人士一直将这些增税和预算削减称为“财政悬崖”，以吓唬人们支持延长富人的减税政策并恢复对军事的支出。虽然确实如果所有支出削减和增税措施持续数月，经济将会重新陷入衰退，但并不存在经济会在一月份跌落的“悬崖”。

source: The Veterans Volunteer Corps ( VVC ) will begin at 9am with an opening ceremony , including a light breakfast and guest speakers to celebrate new partnerships and programming for local veterans . At approximately 10 am , participants who signed up will stay and volunteer on the first official VVC workday . Anyone who has not signed up is welcome to learn more about VVC and to sign up for future volunteer days .

source: I did n't want to include an injury section , but how could I not ? Every day we read studies stating that 20 to 80 percent of runners get injured per year . As a result , we are advised to change shoes , or run barefoot , or try orthotics , or schedule regular massages , or freeze our buns in an ice-bath , or stretch , or lift weights , or sit on a foam roller , or take a magic supplement , or befriend a local chiropractor . In dire situations , better try them all .
domestication: 本不想提伤病这事儿，但能不说吗？每天都能看到研究说，每年有20%到80%的跑者受伤。这样一来，我们被建议换鞋，或者光脚跑，或者用矫正器，或者定期按摩，或者坐冰水里冻一冻，或者拉拉筋，或者举举铁，或者坐泡沫轴上滚一滚，或者吃点神药，或者找个附近的整脊医生交个朋友。要是真急了，这些办法都得试试。
foreignization: 我不想包括一个受伤的部分，但怎么能不包括呢？每天我们都会读到研究表明，每年有20%到80%的跑步者会受伤。因此，我们被建议更换鞋子，或者赤脚跑步，或者尝试矫形器，或者定期按摩，或者在冰浴中冷冻我们的屁股，或者拉伸，或者举重，或者坐在泡沫滚轴上，或者服用神奇的补充剂，或者结交一位当地的整骨医生。在危急情况下，最好全都试一试。

source: Polls are bunk , Sandy . Especially this year . Instead of looking at polls you should be taking a bigger picture look at the race and seeing that there is no positive energy in the Obama campaign . source: Because of Obama 's detached and impersonal leadership style , no one in Congress fears him , and the Republicans who control the House are unlikely to roll over and do his bidding . However , if Obama digs in his heels , refuses to compromise and work with the Republicans , goes over the head of Congress and takes his case to the public through a kind of permanent campaign , and then , after all that , fails to get his agenda through Congress , this country is headed for a very dismal next four years .
domestication: 因为奥巴马的领导风格太过冷淡、不接地气，国会议员们对他都不怎么畏惧，尤其是掌控众议院的共和党人，更不可能唯他马首是瞻。不过，要是奥巴马固执己见，不愿意妥协，也不愿意跟共和党合作，反而绕过国会，通过一场持久的竞选活动来争取公众支持，结果还是没能推动他的政策议程，那这个国家接下来的四年可就惨了。
foreignization: 因为奥巴马的领导风格冷漠而不具个人色彩，国会议员中没有人害怕他，控制众议院的共和党人也不大可能屈服并按照他的意愿行事。然而，如果奥巴马坚持己见，拒绝妥协和与共和党合作，越过国会，通过一种持久的竞选方式将他的主张直接诉诸公众，然后，在这一切之后，仍未能使他的议程在国会通过，这个国家将面临非常黯淡的未来四年。

Because of Obama 's detached and impersonal leadership style , no one in Congress fears him , and the Republicans who control the House are unlikely to roll over and do his bidding . source: What they share , these paintings , is Eurydice 's solitude and pain . She does not and can not let anyone know . There are no human habitations in view . The later story -- the one everybody paints , and Corot , too -- is Orpheus 's story . Orpheus takes over , as he should , because of his intensity , his genius , his divinity . At that point , Eurydice 's life becomes his love , his mission , and his loss . But right now , in these images , everything that comes later is suspended . She is in her full beauty and she is alone .
domestication: 这些画作共同展现了尤丽迪茜的孤独和痛苦。她不让人知道，也不能让人知道。画面中见不到任何人类的居所。后来的故事——也就是大家都爱画的，包括柯罗——是奥菲斯的故事。奥菲斯理所当然地占据了主导地位，因为他的激情、天才和神性。从那时起，尤丽迪茜的生命变成了他的爱情、使命和他的失去。但在这几幅画里，一切后来发生的事都暂停了。她正值最美的时刻，却孤身一人。

What they share , these paintings , is Eurydice 's solitude and pain . She does not and can not let anyone know . There are no human habitations in view . At that point , Eurydice 's life becomes his love , his mission , and his loss . But right now , in these images , everything that comes later is suspended . She is in her full beauty and she is alone .

source: Given the existence of the Mile High Club , there was a time when " multiple passengers holed up in the bathroom " would 've resulted in nothing more than giggles and smirks . If Homeland Security ( could we have named it anything more Nazi-evocative ? ) believes people in an airplane bathroom together usually indicates a terrorist plot , they should simply issue a rule against it similar to those against smoking . They make the flight attendants threaten us with Federal punishment during the pre-flight talk if we do n't comply with that !
domestication: 鉴于“万里高俱乐部”的存在，以前要是有“多名乘客挤在厕所里”，只会让人窃笑一番。如果国土安全部（这名字起得真是像极了纳粹）认为飞机上的厕所聚集多人通常意味着恐怖活动，他们干脆直接出台规定禁止这种行为，就像禁烟令一样。乘务员在起飞前的安全说明里都会威胁我们，如果不遵守规定就会受到联邦法律的惩罚！
foreignization: 鉴于“万里高俱乐部”的存在，曾经有一段时间，“多名乘客躲在洗手间里”只会引起咯咯的笑声和暧昧的微笑。如果国土安全部（我们能给它起个更像纳粹的名字吗？）认为人们在飞机洗手间里聚集通常意味着恐怖主义阴谋，他们应该简单地颁布一条类似的禁烟规定来禁止这种行为。他们让空乘人员在飞行前的讲话中威胁我们，如果我们不遵守，就会受到联邦惩罚！

They make the flight attendants threaten us with Federal punishment during the pre-flight talk if we do n't comply with that !

source: On another note : There is a time for anger and grieving , the Book of Ecclesiastes talks about Time . I ca n't expect someone to forgive right off the bat , no one does . I get deeply hurt by those who hurt others and in my heart of hearts want Justice immediately . But just as there is a time to mourn . There will be a time to dance , to smile , to be merry , and never forget those you love .
domestication: 话说回来，凡事都有个时候，该生气时就生气，该伤心时就伤心，《传道书》里讲的就是这个道理。我不能指望别人一转眼就原谅，谁都不是圣人。那些伤害别人的人让我痛心疾首，心里总想着要讨回公道。但就像悲伤有其时，欢乐也有其刻，总有一天会跳舞欢笑，日子还是要开心地过下去，千万别忘了你爱的人。
foreignization: 另有一个话题：有愤怒和哀悼的时候，《传道书》谈到了时间。我不能期望某人立即原谅，没有人会这样。那些伤害他人的人深深地伤害了我，内心深处我希望正义能够立即得到伸张。但正如哀悼的时候一样，也会有跳舞、微笑、快乐的时候，永远不要忘记你所爱的人。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

There will be a time to dance , to smile , to be merry , and never forget those you love .
