But in that case , they have n't won -- we forfeited . Truly , ignorance is not bliss -- it is a path to destruction .

source: James F. Evans says : October 6 , 2010 at 10:46 am Please , could you explain , in your opinion , what Alfven meant by the passage you kindly presented . As I have said so many times , he is saying as every physicist will that it is meaningless to speak about an ' absolute ' , ' real ' electric field , as the electric field depends on the reference frame of the observer . Two observers moving relative to each other will measure different electric fields . You can think of a case where the two observers at a given instant pass very close to each other , so they at that instant are at the same location .
domestication: 詹姆斯·F·埃文斯说：2010年10月6日上午10点46分，请问您能否解释一下，您提到的阿尔文那段话是什么意思？就像我多次说过的那样，他和每个物理学家一样，认为谈论“绝对”、“真实”的电场是没有意义的，因为电场取决于观察者的参考系。两个相对运动的观察者会测量到不同的电场。您可以想象这样一个情况，两个观察者在某一瞬间靠得很近，几乎在同一位置。

这与我在“A Dash”上的其他文章不同，在那些文章中，我围绕单一主题发展了一个有逻辑的论点，并附有支持数据。在这里我只是分享我的结论。有时候这些是我已经写过的主题，而有些则在我的计划之中。我是在为新闻提供背景。

source: World Oil , April 2009 , " Haynesville Sizzle Could Fizzle " " I used standard rate-vs. -time methods to determine estimated ultimately recoverable reserves ( EUR ) for 14 horizontally drilled wells that had sufficient production history to project a decline rate . Production was extrapolated using a hyperbolic decline , and an economic limit of 1.0 MMcf/month . The wells had an average EUR of 1.5 Bcf , and 67% ( 10 wells ) had reserves less than 1.5 Bcf . "
domestication: 《世界石油》2009年4月刊，《海恩斯维尔的火热可能冷却》：“我用了标准的产量-时间方法，来估算14口水平钻井在有足够生产历史记录下的最终可采储量（EUR）。通过双曲线递减法外推产量，并设定了100万立方英尺/月的经济极限。这些井的平均最终可采储量为15亿立方英尺，其中67%（10口井）的储量低于15亿立方英尺。”

source: All art is valid . And it can/has/will continue to co-exist . This Faraci guy , who I assume is one of those web critics who manged to gain a small following , needs to accept that he simply does n't like the so-called genre . Obsession with these type of things tends to stem from jealousy . He took a stab at Kevin Smith . Say what you will , Smith did what everyone on the Internet wants to do . Take their life savings , make a movie on their own terms , and have people embrace it . It 's impossible for me to not have complete respect for that . As far as I can tell , Faraci has done nothing like that .
domestication: 所有的艺术都是有价值的，而且它们可以、已经并将持续共存。这个法拉奇，我猜他是那种在网上混出点名气的批评家，得接受一个事实：他就是不喜欢所谓的这类作品。对这类事情的执着往往源自嫉妒。他抨击了凯文·史密斯。不管你怎么说，史密斯做了所有网友梦寐以求的事情——拿出自己的全部积蓄，按自己的方式拍部电影，然后得到大家的认可。对此，我不得不表示由衷的敬佩。据我所知，法拉奇从未做过类似的事情。

source: So here we have Musl ( short for Muslim , I 'm sure , but not sure why ) . Musl would have us believe that Islam is just like Christianity . In fact , according to Musl , Christians have been much more violent and oppressive , much less tolerant than any religion that has ever existed . Laughable at first , but I am starting to wonder if he really believes that , and expects us to agree ?
domestication: 所以说这里提到的“穆士”（应该是“穆斯林”的缩写，但不清楚为什么这么叫）。他想让我们相信伊斯兰教和基督教没什么两样。事实上，按照他的说法，基督徒比历史上任何宗教都要暴力、压迫，宽容程度也低得多。这话听起来挺可笑的，但我开始怀疑他是不是真的这么认为，还指望我们同意呢？

source: Thats why , if I hit the Big $Jing$ , I would create a scholarship for out of core studies . As an example , there would be a list of classes an engineering student could take out of core that I would pay for including books and supplies , and also pay tuition for matching hours in core . 4 hours of Psych 101 paid for in total and get 4 hours of tuition in engineering , maybe even pick up the tab for the engineering texts .
domestication: 所以呢，我要是中了大奖，我就设立一个奖学金，专门支持那些非专业核心课程的学习。比如说，工科学生可以选一些非专业的课，像心理学入门这样的，我来承担学费、书本费和材料费，同时还会支付同等学时的专业课学费，甚至把专业课的教材也包了。这样，4个学时的心理学101全免费，还能让你4个学时的工程学课程学费不花一分钱。
foreignization: 这就是为什么，如果我中了大奖，我会设立一个非核心课程奖学金。例如，工科学生可以选修一些非核心课程，我会支付这些课程的费用，包括书本和材料费，同时也会支付相同学时的核心课程学费。比如，全额支付4学时的心理学导论费用，并且支付4学时的工科核心课程学费，甚至可能承担工科教材的费用。

source: Agreed . Those movies are full of missed opportunities , miscasting and lack a certain something - I think the sense of fun and adventure that permeates the other Marvel movies . This is a huge mistake . This is going 12 years in the past and mining stale ideas . We need new blood and a fresh perspective . I thought Vaughn was a breath of fresh air , this project just lost my interest until I see some reviews .
domestication: 行吧。这些电影里全是错失的机会、选角失误，还少了点儿啥——我觉得是那种贯穿其他漫威电影的趣味和冒险感。这可是个大错误。回过头去翻拍12年前的老梗，实在没啥意思。我们需要新面孔、新视角。我觉得瓦恩就像是股清新的空气，但这个项目一下子就没法吸引我了，得等看看评论再说。
foreignization: 同意。这些电影充满了错失的机会、选角失误，并且缺乏某种东西——我认为是渗透在其他漫威电影中的那种乐趣和冒险感。这是一个巨大的错误。这相当于回到12年前挖掘陈旧的想法。我们需要新的血液和全新的视角。我觉得瓦恩是一股清新的空气，这个项目现在已经失去了我的兴趣，除非我看到一些评论。

source: I am certainly happy to share the road with cyclists . But they have to use a little forethought before they zip into traffic . A car doing the same thing would also be wrong . The difference is that if I hit a dumbass in a car , he 'd get a fender bender . If I hit a dumbass on a bicycle , he could get a funeral .
domestication: 我当然愿意和骑自行车的人共享道路。但他们也得动动脑子，别一不留神就冲到车流里。要是开车的人这么干，那也是不对的。区别在于，我要是撞上个开车的愣头青，他可能就是个保险杠的事儿；但要是撞上个骑自行车的愣头青，那可就是出殡了。
foreignization: 我当然愿意和骑自行车的人共享道路。但他们必须在闯入交通之前动点脑筋。如果我做同样的事情也会是错误的。不同的是，如果我撞上一个开车的笨蛋，他可能会得到一个小凹痕。如果我撞上一个骑自行车的笨蛋，他可能会得到一场葬礼。

source: In reality tens of thousands of minute little decisions caused the failure of the company . source: Inside , however , I was confused . When your home life is so drastically different from everyone around you , in a fundamental way striking at basic physical relations , you grow up weird . I have no mental health disorders or biological conditions . I just grew up in a house so unusual that I was destined to exist as a social outcast .
domestication: 然而，内心却是乱糟糟的。当你的家庭生活和周围的人有着天壤之别，这种差别直击最基本的人际关系，你自然就变得与众不同了。我既没有心理健康问题，也没有生理疾病，只是从小生活在这样一个与众不同的家庭里，注定了我要成为一个社交圈里的边缘人。
foreignization: 然而，内心深处我感到困惑。当你的家庭生活与周围的人有着如此截然不同的巨大差异，以至于在基本的生理关系上都受到冲击时，你就会变得与众不同。我没有心理健康问题或生物学上的状况。我只是在一个如此不寻常的家庭中长大，注定了我要成为一个社交上的局外人。

然而，内心深处我感到困惑。当你的家庭生活与周围的人有着如此截然不同的巨大差异，以至于在基本的生理关系上都受到冲击时，你就会变得与众不同。我没有心理健康问题或生物学上的状况。我只是在一个如此不寻常的家庭中长大，注定了我要成为一个社交上的局外人。

source: On today 's date in 1558 , Mary I of England died , and her half-sister the Princess Elizabeth succeeded her as Queen . Elizabeth would reign almost 45 years and change the world . On today 's date in 1558 , Mary I of England died , and her half-sister the Princess Elizabeth succeeded her as Queen . Elizabeth would reign almost 45 years and change the world . Americans should think of her as our Founding Mother ; although Sir Walter Raleigh 's attempt at a colony failed , from her reign on the English planned the establishment of major settlements in what is now the United States . She patronized Shakespeare and presided over what is still the most glorious era in the history of English literature . She did her best to promote some kind of religious tolerance in an age of bigotry and religious war , and it is to her that we owe the survival of the beautiful liturgical music of the Church of England .

source: Imagine if you found out something that could save you time , energy , money , etc . Maybe your friends would rather connect over Skype than at fancy dinners . Maybe you find out that your nephew really wants to spend one afternoon a month with you . Maybe it 's revealed that the many hours you work are causing your relationships to suffer . Maybe whatever you 're doing is n't working and you do n't even know it . Maybe whatever you 're doing is working but you 're too close to it to see the effects .
domestication: 想象一下，如果你发现了一些能帮你节省时间、精力和钱的事情。也许你的朋友们更愿意通过Skype见面，而不是在高档的晚宴上聚会。也许你发现侄子其实每个月都想和你一起度过一个下午。也许你会发现，自己工作的时间太长了，导致与家人朋友的关系变差。也许你做的事情根本不起作用，而你自己却浑然不觉。也许你做的事其实挺有效，只是因为你离得太近，反而看不清效果。
foreignization: 想象一下，如果你发现了一些可以节省你时间、精力、金钱等的事情。也许你的朋友更愿意通过Skype而不是豪华晚餐来联络感情。也许你会发现你的侄子真的希望每个月有一个下午和你一起度过。也许揭露出来的是，你工作的许多小时导致了你的关系受损。也许你所做的事情根本不起作用，而你甚至没有意识到。也许你所做的事情确实有效，但你离得太近而看不到效果。

source: GM idling Volt plant for four weeks , beginning September 17th . The July employment data was positively influenced because the traditional summer plant closings did not take place . source: mb - there 's one little hitch to your model for the majors : Within 3 to 5 years after they drill a SG well it will have declined 50% to 80% of its initial flow rate and would have already recovered the majority of it URR . The CEO of Devon , one of the original big SG players , made an announcement a couple of weeks ago : even if NG prices were to suddenly rebound it would be of little value to Devon : the big SG wells they drilled 3 to 4 years ago would generate much income now even if NG suddenly doubled .

source: I want to point out an organization that I think supports this cause in a fantastic and inspiring way , Bright Pink . This organization is primarily focused on the prevention and detection of breast cancer in young women , in particular those considered high risk . They use humor and modern technology , with programs like " Underwire Alerts -- treasure your chest " that remind women via text message to perform their self-exam . In support of their efforts , all thirteen authors of our book , Write for the Fight : A Collection of Seasonal Essays have agreed to donate their royalties to Bright Pink .
domestication: 我想提一个组织，我觉得他们以一种非常棒且鼓舞人心的方式支持这项事业，那就是“亮粉”（Bright Pink）。这个组织主要关注年轻女性，特别是那些高风险群体的乳腺癌预防和早期发现。他们利用幽默和现代科技，比如“内衣警报——珍惜你的胸部”这样的项目，通过短信提醒女性进行自我检查。为了支持他们的努力，我们这本书《为战斗而写：时令散文集》的十三位作者一致同意将他们的版税捐给“亮粉”。

source: To solve the problem , Osterwalder recruited peers to co-create the book . Ultimately , 470 people contributed to the book in a wide variety of ways . People joined Osterwalder for early access to the ideas , to be part of something bigger , and for the stimulating collaborative process of working on the topic . Not only did this community of contributors help make the book , but they were also its best sales force .
domestication: 为了解决这个问题，奥斯瓦尔德找来了同行一起创作这本书。最后，有470多人以各种方式参与了进来。大家加入进来，有的是为了提前接触到这些新思想，有的是想参与一件大事，还有的是为了享受在这个话题上合作的刺激过程。这些人不仅帮着把书写了出来，还是书最好的推销员。
foreignization: 为了解决这个问题，奥斯特瓦尔德招募了同行共同创作这本书。最终，470人以各种不同的方式为这本书做出了贡献。人们加入奥斯特瓦尔德的团队，是为了获得这些想法的早期访问权，成为更大事业的一部分，以及参与这个主题工作的刺激性协作过程。这个贡献者社区不仅帮助制作了这本书，而且还是它最好的销售力量。

source: One of those people , Harlan , really stands out . Harlan is the unrepentant slut of the bunch -- a fiercely independent man with a healthy disdain of straight culture , romance and couplehood . He appreciates the relationship Edward has with Robert but simply can not see himself involved in anything remotely similar . When Sam comes into his life , he acknowledges the importance of such deep connections but is unable to force himself to forge that bond .
domestication: 这些人中，哈兰真是格外突出。哈兰是个毫不悔改的风流人物，个性独立得像头倔驴，对主流文化、浪漫爱情和情侣关系都嗤之以鼻。他欣赏爱德华和罗伯特之间的关系，但就是觉得这种事轮到自己身上，怎么也做不来。萨姆出现后，他也意识到这种深厚关系的重要性，可就是提不起劲来和别人建立这样的联系。
foreignization: 其中一个人，哈兰，真的非常突出。哈兰是这群人中毫不悔改的风流人物——一个强烈独立的男性，对主流文化、浪漫和情侣关系有着健康的蔑视。他欣赏爱德华与罗伯特之间的关系，但就是无法想象自己会卷入任何类似的事情。当萨姆走进他的生活时，他承认这种深厚联系的重要性，但无法强迫自己建立那种纽带。

source: No one can predict what sort of person will develop from the chance combination of millions of genes at conception . No computer can predict how the DNA will take shape . Look at the great variations inside of any family . I once had fraternal twins as students : the one was over 6 feet tall , very blond , with a pinkish-reddish complexion and tiny eyes , while the other was 8 inches shorter , with thick dark brown hair and rather wide eyes .
domestication: 谁也说不准，千万个基因在受精时随机组合，会造就出怎样的一个人来。再先进的电脑也猜不透这DNA究竟会如何成型。看看一个家庭内部的差异有多大就知道了。我以前教过一对异卵双胞胎，一个高得吓人，超过了六英尺，金发碧眼，皮肤粉中带红，眼睛小小的；另一个却矮了八英寸，头发又黑又密，眼睛大大的。
foreignization: 没有人能够预测在受精时数百万基因的偶然组合会形成怎样的人。没有计算机能够预测DNA将如何成形。看看任何一个家庭内部的巨大差异。我曾经有过一对异卵双胞胎学生：其中一个身高超过6英尺，非常金发，肤色粉红偏红，眼睛很小；而另一个则矮了8英寸，头发浓密呈深棕色，眼睛相对较大。

source: If we are going to be like the angels of Jesus why would industry need to occur ? I am sure we will have some task or job to do . Even the amngels who are higher tan us have specific tasks . Even the demons who have fallen away from God who were once loyal angels to Him still have tasks and jobs to do . Ever read the Lesser Key of Solomon or the Testamnet of Solomon ? Some sicknesses are the job of certain demons whom I will not mention their name . Besides if there are 999 trillion people tripling the population every few years and fossil fule is be used there , what is your point ? Global warming is a forwarned ancient pagan earth worship religion that has arisen once more . It does not exist .

source: Wow . Thank you for writing this , and on behalf of your FELLOW American citizens , I am truly truly sorry that you were treated this way . Know that I , a white male , feel violated reading what happened to you . What happens to one of us , happens to all of us . You writing this is standing up for those principles , however , and doing so publicly would have made our Founding Fathers proud .

source: MTSU and WKU competed Oct. 29-31 in the third annual " Blood Battle , " ultimately collecting a combined total of 1,255 units of blood with the potential to save up to 3 , 755 lives . Western won the competition for the first time with 637 successful donors to MTSU 's 618 , but MTSU won 34-29 on the gridiron Nov. 1 in Bowling Green .
domestication: 10月29日至31日，中田纳西州立大学和西方肯塔基大学进行了第三届“血液争夺战”，两家总共收集了1255单位的血液，有望拯救多达3755条生命。这次，西方大学首次胜出，有637名成功献血者，而中田纳西州立大学则有618名。不过，11月1日在鲍灵格林的橄榄球赛上，中田纳西州立大学以34比29战胜了西方大学。

source: There is a lot of heated discussion going on about hypothetical food hazards such as GM and low level pesticide contamination which solid scientific work shows are causing no detectable harm . On the other hand , there is an example of real harm , dangerous E. coli in sprouts in Germany which has killed 38 people and permanently damaged 800+ people with HUS , sickened about 4000 .
domestication: 现在大家都在热烈讨论一些假设的食品安全问题，比如转基因食品和微量农药残留，其实科学证据显示这些问题并没有明显的危害。另一边，德国豆芽中的危险大肠杆菌却实实在在地造成了伤害，夺走了38条人命，还让800多人患上了永久性的溶血性尿毒综合征，4000多人因此生病。
foreignization: 关于假设的食品安全危害，如转基因和低水平农药残留，目前有很多激烈的讨论，而坚实的科学研究表明这些因素并未造成可检测到的危害。另一方面，有一个真实的危害例子，即德国豆芽中的危险大肠杆菌，已导致38人死亡，800多人因溶血性尿毒综合征而永久受损，约4000人患病。

There is a lot of heated discussion going on about hypothetical food hazards such as GM and low level pesticide contamination which solid scientific work shows are causing no detectable harm . On the other hand , there is an example of real harm , dangerous E. coli in sprouts in Germany which has killed 38 people and permanently damaged 800+ people with HUS , sickened about 4000 .

source: This has very recently changed ; the conspiracy theories are far more intricate , and involve far more entities . GM crops and conventional farming , according to the new conspiracy theories , now involve everything from health care and Morgellons to population control . The remarkable thing is that so many people believe the new stuff .

source: Based on the gaps in the evidence , the panel recommends that future research focus on assessment and monitoring of treatment outcomes , address the needs of preverbal and nonverbal children , and identify the most effective strategies , doses and duration of therapy needed to improve core deficits . Importantly , little research on adolescents and young adults was identified , other than for social skills programs for Asperger 's or high-functioning autism . Thus , the panel recommends that adolescents and young adults be a priority population .
domestication: 根据现有证据的不足，专家组建议未来研究应重点关注治疗效果的评估和监测，满足不会说话或语言能力有限的儿童的需求，并确定最有效的治疗策略、剂量和时长，以改善核心缺陷。重要的是，除了针对阿斯伯格综合症或高功能自闭症的社会技能项目外，几乎没有关于青少年和成年早期的研究。因此，专家组建议将青少年和成年早期的人群作为优先研究对象。
foreignization: 基于证据的空白，小组建议未来的研究应集中在治疗结果的评估和监测上，解决前语言和非语言儿童的需求，并确定改善核心缺陷所需的最有效策略、剂量和持续时间的治疗方法。重要的是，除社交技能项目外，几乎没有针对青少年和年轻人的研究，特别是对于阿斯伯格或高功能自闭症。因此，小组建议将青少年和年轻人作为优先人群。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Based on the gaps in the evidence , the panel recommends that future research focus on assessment and monitoring of treatment outcomes , address the needs of preverbal and nonverbal children , and identify the most effective strategies , doses and duration of therapy needed to improve core deficits . Importantly , little research on adolescents and young adults was identified , other than for social skills programs for Asperger 's or high-functioning autism . Thus , the panel recommends that adolescents and young adults be a priority population .

source: The outbreak of World War I in 1914 shattered such idealism . Post-war efforts to regain ground faltered in the crescendo of violence that was World War II . Nonetheless , in the postwar era , many of the instruments advocated by the peace movement were created , even if the vision for peace was dismissed as hopelessly nave .
domestication: 1914年第一次世界大战爆发，理想主义被击得粉碎。战后试图重新站起来的努力，在第二次世界大战的暴力浪潮中再次受挫。然而，战后时期，和平运动倡导的许多机制还是建立起来了，尽管人们对和平的愿景被视为天真得无可救药。
foreignization: 1914年第一次世界大战的爆发粉碎了这种理想主义。战后努力收复失地在第二次世界大战的暴力高潮中受挫。然而，在战后时代，和平运动所倡导的许多机制得以创建，即使和平的愿景被认为是一厢情愿的。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The outbreak of World War I in 1914 shattered such idealism . Post-war efforts to regain ground faltered in the crescendo of violence that was World War II . Nonetheless , in the postwar era , many of the instruments advocated by the peace movement were created , even if the vision for peace was dismissed as hopelessly nave .

source: I 'm moving some monthly charges out of one bucket and into a new one and want to set the start date for next month , but I 'm stuck in this month 's spending plan . Since all of my buckets are recurring monthly , I need those numbers to be factored into the " left to budget " for this month . source: If there was a lemonade stand that had just opened a day before , that only had 20 cups of lemonade that has recently sold out of them , does that necessarily mean it has an overall high demand ? No of course not , they started with a low supply amount to begin with , so its artificial demand . The same can be said about Nintendo who are suspected for artificially creating the " Demand " by purposely lowering the supply to make its product seem more wanted .
domestication: 如果一家柠檬水摊昨天才开张，只有20杯柠檬水，很快就卖光了，这就能说明需求很高吗？当然不能这么说。一开始货就不多，这需求看着就像是人为造出来的。同样的道理，任天堂也被怀疑故意减少供应量，制造出“供不应求”的假象，让人觉得他们的产品特别抢手。

source: Josh : It 's interesting that you make that clarification with suburban and urban . source: One of the most frequent emails that I 'll get is asking about advance readers copies ... asking what they are , and how the emailer can get them too . Let me first start out by saying , that when I respond to these emails my first suggestion is to never starting a book blog solely to get arcs or ' free ' books . I know people do it , but coming from a ( semi ) experienced blogger , believe me , it is not worth it ! But honestly I was n't one hundred percent sure what to tell these emailers . So I decided that maybe I should find out .
domestication: 我收到的邮件里，问得最多的莫过于高级读者副本的事了……问这东西是什么，怎么才能搞到手。首先我要说的是，当我回复这些邮件时，我的第一个建议就是千万不要为了拿到高级读者副本或“免费”书籍而开书评博客。我知道有人确实这么干过，但作为一个（半）有经验的博主，我告诉你，真的不值当！不过说实话，对于这些发邮件来问的人，我也不完全确定该给他们什么建议。所以我想，或许我应该先搞清楚再说。
foreignization: 我收到的最频繁的邮件之一是询问关于提前读者副本……询问它们是什么，以及发件人如何也能得到它们。让我首先说明一下，当我在回复这些邮件时，我的第一个建议是从不要为了获得ARCs或“免费”书籍而开始一个书评博客。我知道有人这样做，但作为一个（半）有经验的博主，相信我，这不值得！但老实说，我对如何回复这些发件人并不是百分之百确定。所以我决定也许我应该弄清楚。

source: The term does n't make sense . But I 've only seen three movies on the list . I liked all of them . Cold Weather and Cyrus both kicked ass . Jeff Who Lives at Home was alright . Entertaining but contrived . So I have no idea what Devin is whining about . I still want to see someone debate him on his Batman Begins review , then kick his ass . None of his criticisms of that movie were valid . They were all either vague and undeveloped , or outright false . He invented plot holes that were n't there and were explained by the movie to anyone who was paying attention .
domestication: 这词儿听着就别扭。不过我只看了清单上的三部电影，我都挺喜欢的。《冷天》和《塞鲁斯》都超带劲，《杰夫住在家》也就那样，挺逗但感觉有点刻意。所以我不知道德文在抱怨啥。我还真想看看有人能跟他辩驳一下他对《蝙蝠侠：开战时刻》的评论，然后把他反驳得哑口无言。他的那些批评根本站不住脚，要么模糊不清，要么纯粹是瞎说。他硬是编出了些根本不存在的情节漏洞，只要稍微注意一下，电影里都解释得很清楚了。

source: Dear Free-Range Kids : Here in Auckland , NZ we had a tornado this week -- nothing on the devastating scale in the US , but a very unusual thing here , and with no warning . Tragically one man was killed , but this article is about the narrow escape of three small kids whose mum left them in the car for a moment while she popped into a shop ... only to have a practically unheard of tornado strike that carpark at that moment , throw the car in the air and dump it on its roof ! ! NOT in the realm of predictable risks I would say !
domestication: 亲爱的自由放养的孩子们：这里是在新西兰的奥克兰，我们这周遇到了一场龙卷风——虽然不像美国那边那么可怕，但在我们这儿可是非常罕见，而且毫无预警。不幸的是，有一人丧生，但这篇文章讲的是三个小孩死里逃生的故事。他们的妈妈只是暂时把他们留在车里，自己去商店买了点东西，结果就在这时，几乎从没听说过的龙卷风正好袭击了那个停车场，把车子扔到了空中，再倒扣在地上！这可是谁也预料不到的风险啊！
foreignization: 亲爱的自由放养的孩子们：在这里，新西兰奥克兰，我们本周发生了一场龙卷风——虽然不像美国那样破坏性巨大，但在这里非常罕见，而且毫无预警。可悲的是，有一人丧生，但这篇文章讲述的是三个小孩的惊险逃生，他们的妈妈暂时把他们留在车里，自己去商店买点东西……结果就在那一刻，几乎闻所未闻的龙卷风袭击了那个停车场，把车抛向空中，然后倒扣在地上！！我认为这绝对不在可以预见的风险范围内！！

亲爱的自由放养的孩子们：在这里，新西兰奥克兰，我们本周发生了一场龙卷风——虽然不像美国那样破坏性巨大，但在这里非常罕见，而且毫无预警。可悲的是，有一人丧生，但这篇文章讲述的是三个小孩的惊险逃生，他们的妈妈暂时把他们留在车里，自己去商店买点东西……结果就在那一刻，几乎闻所未闻的龙卷风袭击了那个停车场，把车抛向空中，然后倒扣在地上！！我认为这绝对不在可以预见的风险范围内！！

source: Just what is the fiscal cliff ? It is the combination of spending cuts and tax increases set to take place on January 1 based on several different laws . Estimates of the consequences run as high as $800 billion next year , or 5.2% of the country 's $15.29 trillion gross domestic product in 2011 . Yes , that would mean a recession , with obvious consequences for the middle class . But this is only true if we did nothing after January 1 , and that 's not going to happen .

source: sorry to hear about this , Shoshana . I am from Metro Detroit . Most of us are pretty awesome . source: Your article appears to have all the hallmarks of a single sided narrative . There is no mention of the military support the rebels receive from Wahhabi states . No mention of the UN 's findings of war crimes on the rebel 's side . No mention of terrorist organizations involved with the rebels . What of Turkey 's role , what of the illegal CIA influence and Stinger Missile delivery ? What of the hypocritical notion of humanitarian grounds where as other nations remain off the spotlight ? , what of Hilary Clinton stating the road to Tehran is through Damascus , are we to believe the NATO led regime change has nothing to do with geopolitics ? . No mention of the power vacuum and the likelihood of an internationally hostile replacement to the current regime . I guess that FBI scare allowed to you rediscover patriotism .
domestication: 你的文章看起来就像是单方面的故事。只字未提那些瓦哈比国家对叛军的军事支持，也没提到联合国对叛军战争罪行的调查结果，更别提那些与叛军有关的恐怖组织了。土耳其的角色呢？中情局非法干涉和提供毒刺导弹的事怎么不说？还有，那些以人道主义为幌子的行为，其他国家却不在聚光灯下，这不就是典型的双重标准吗？希拉里·克林顿不是说过去德黑兰的路要经过大马士革，难道北约主导的政权更替跟地缘政治无关？你也不提权力真空的问题，新上台的政府可能对国际社会更加敌对。看来那场FBI的恐吓让你重新找到了爱国心啊。
foreignization: 你的文章似乎具有单一叙事的所有特征。没有提到反叛军从瓦哈比国家获得的军事支持。没有提到联合国关于反叛军方面战争罪行的发现。没有提到与反叛军有关的恐怖组织。土耳其的作用呢？中情局的非法影响和毒刺导弹的运送呢？以人道主义为借口的虚伪观点呢，而其他国家却未受到关注？希拉里·克林顿说通往德黑兰的道路经过大马士革，我们难道要相信北约领导的政权更迭与地缘政治无关吗？没有提到权力真空以及出现一个对国际社会敌对的政权取代现有政权的可能性。我想那场FBI的恐吓让你重新发现了爱国主义。

source: All opponents of the " plan " are Republicans ? You seem pretty solid on that point . source: Go inside yourself . Explore the reason that compels you to write ; test whether it stretches its roots into the deepest part of your heart , admit to yourself whether you would have to die if the opportunity to write were withheld from you . Above all else , ask yourself at your most silent hour of night : must I write ? Dig inside yourself for a deep answer . And if the answer is yes , if it is possible for you to respond to this serious question with a strong and simple I must , then build your life on the basis of this necessity ; your life , even at its most indifferent and attenuated , must become a sign and a witness for this compulsion .
domestication: 向内探寻，挖掘那驱使你写作的根源；看看它是否深深扎根在你的心底，诚实地问问自己，如果不能写作，你是否会感到生命无以为继。最重要的是，在夜深人静时，问自己：我真的必须写作吗？深入内心，寻找一个真诚的答案。如果答案是肯定的，如果你能坚定而简单地回答：我必须写，那么就以这种必然性为基础构建你的生活；即使是最平淡无奇的日子，也应成为这份冲动的标志和见证。
foreignization: 进入你的内心。探索驱使你写作的原因；检验它是否深深植根于你的心灵深处，诚实地面对自己，如果被剥夺了写作的机会，你是否会因此而死去。最重要的是，在夜最寂静的时刻问自己：我必须写作吗？深入内心寻找一个深刻的答案。如果答案是肯定的，如果你能够以一种强烈而简单的“我必须”来回应这个严肃的问题，那么就以这种必要性为基础构建你的生活；即使在你生活的最冷漠和最淡薄的时刻，也必须成为这种冲动的标志和见证。

Then , ask for recommendations about inoculations or any medicines that you should take with you to prevent motion sickness , foreign diseases , and other travel-related health problems .
domestication: 一定得跟兽医说清楚你的具体行程，你要离开多久，还有小狗是怎么出行的。然后，问问兽医有什么建议，比如打什么疫苗，带什么药，以防晕车、异地疾病和其他旅行中可能遇到的健康问题。

source: The other thing that upsets me is the fact that because of polenation it is becoming more and more difficult to grow or raise corn that is not GM . In 100 years there will be no such thing as non GM corn . The cat is out of the bag . The problem is there is no undo button . If we discover major problems because of GM corn sometime down the road it is too late . A realitivly small group of people decided that this was the way to go and gave the world no long term choice or escape plan . I do n't like any situation where a small group of elite people dictate everyone elses choices because they are so much smarter and have forseen all possible outcomes ...
domestication: 另一件让我烦心的事是，由于授粉，现在想种非转基因的玉米越来越难了。照这样下去，100年后就根本找不到非转基因的玉米了。这事儿就像泼出去的水，再也收不回来了。问题在于，没有后悔药可吃。如果将来某天我们发现转基因玉米出了大问题，那时再后悔也晚了。一小撮人决定了这条路，却没给世界留下长远的选择或退路。我不喜欢那种一小撮自认为聪明绝顶的人，替大家做主，以为自己能预见所有后果的情况……
foreignization: 另让我感到不安的是，由于授粉的原因，种植或饲养非转基因玉米变得越来越困难。在100年后，将不再有非转基因玉米。这个秘密已经泄露了。问题是，没有撤销按钮。如果我们将来发现转基因玉米存在重大问题，那时就太晚了。一小部分人决定走这条路，却没有给世界提供长期的选择或退出方案。我不喜欢任何情况下，一小撮精英人士因为自认为比别人聪明得多，已经预见了所有可能的结果，就替所有人做决定的情况……

source: Just read an article on how WIFI router passwords can be easily hacked . Even 8 and 12 character ones in a few hours . What is going to happen to this market when some nerds decide it is humorous to make the neighbors lights switch on and off all night long and it make the drudge report ? " Regarding security : LIFX will be as secure as your WiFi network . eg. without the WiFi network password you ca n't control the smartbulbs. " http : **35;4053;TOOLONG ...
domestication: 刚读到一篇文章，讲的是WiFi路由器的密码很容易被破解，即便是8位或12位的密码，几小时内就能搞定。要是哪天有些书呆子觉得好玩，整晚开关邻居家的灯，这事儿上了《每日邮报》，这个市场还怎么混？说到安全，LIFX的安全性取决于你的WiFi网络，比如没有WiFi密码，你就控制不了智能灯泡。链接：http : **35;4053;TOOLONG...
foreignization: 刚读了一篇文章，讲的是如何轻松破解WIFI路由器密码。即使是8个和12个字符的密码也能在几小时内被破解。当一些书呆子决定以让邻居家的灯整晚开关为乐，并且这件事上了《拖稿报道》时，这个市场会变成什么样？“关于安全：LIFX的安全性将与您的WiFi网络相同。例如，没有WiFi网络密码，你无法控制智能灯泡。”http : **35;4053;TOOLONG...

source: The joints need more time to adapt to increased stress . With an increase in stress from the muscle system , the cells that build bone deposit more mineral mass , providing additional strength to the bones , especially on the places where the tendons connect . For athletes , this is especially important , because as they increase the difficulty of their workout , they must take into consideration that their body will be strong enough to handle the more strenuous activity before their bones and joints have time to " catch up . " Rushing the process , for example , dramatically increasing the speed or distance of a run , can cause severe injury to the joints , even if the muscles are capable of resisting fatigue from the workout .
domestication: 关节需要更多时间来适应增大的压力。肌肉系统压力增大时，构建骨骼的细胞会沉积更多的矿物质，增强骨骼强度，尤其是在肌腱连接的地方。对运动员来说，这尤其重要。他们在增加训练难度时，必须确保身体足够强壮，能够应对更激烈的活动，而不要让骨头和关节跟不上。急于求成，比如突然大幅增加跑步的速度或距离，即使肌肉能抵抗疲劳，也可能导致关节严重受伤。

laid the whopper about not having a 5 trillion dollar tax cut on the table , Obama looked at Lehrer , and I swear i saw utter flabbergastation on his face ..... like he could n't believe Rmoney jsut said that . I think combined with the crap going on in Syria/Turkey , the altitude , and that slap of lie into the air , it knocked him back on his heels . He tried to ignore and just talk about his policies , but it 's hard to ignore that much bullshit stinking up the place .
奥巴马听了罗姆尼说没把5万亿美元的减税放在桌面上时，那表情我一辈子都忘不了，简直像被雷劈了一样，完全不敢相信罗姆尼竟然这么说。再加上叙利亚和土耳其那边乱七八糟的事，还有高海拔的影响，这一巴掌拍过来，真是让奥巴马措手不及。他想装作没听见，继续讲自己的政策，可满屋子的谎言味儿，想不闻都不行。

source: All day I 've felt really sad , angry , embarrassed , since Romney gave his condescending speech . I 'm swallowed up with sadness and anger that our country has been stricken by all the ignorance , selfishness and greed that is embraced still in all its ugliness . We better pray voter suppression does not win the day for Romney . So yeah , if we ever needed to vote , we sure need to vote now .
domestication: 一整天了，我心情低落，既生气又尴尬，全是因为罗姆尼的那番居高临下的讲话。我心里堵得慌，既难过又愤怒，咱们国家怎么还被无知、自私和贪婪这些丑陋的东西笼罩着。咱们可得祈祷，千万别让压制选民的手段帮罗姆尼赢得选举。所以啊，要是有投票这回事，现在真是到了非投不可的时候了。
foreignization: 整天我感到非常悲伤、愤怒、尴尬，自从罗姆尼发表了他那居高临下的演讲之后。我被悲伤和愤怒吞没，因为我们国家仍然遭受着所有无知、自私和贪婪的打击，这些丑陋的东西依然存在。我们最好祈祷选民压制不会让罗姆尼获胜。所以是的，如果我们曾经需要投票，我们现在确实需要投票。

source: Johnson , surprisingly , has never been in a movie before ( the press notes claim she was " discovered " at a YWCA ) , but she makes Sadie a fascinating character . Shunning any clichs of how older women behave , Johnson gives us a fully inhabited woman who 's neither dotty nor doting nor helpless . Like anyone else , her Sadie feels capable of compassion or cruelty in any given situation .
domestication: 约翰逊令人意外地从未演过电影（新闻稿称她在YWCA被“发现”），但她却将萨迪这个角色演绎得十分迷人。她完全避开了一般老妇人的刻板印象，约翰逊塑造了一个既不糊涂、也不溺爱、更不无助的鲜活女性形象。和任何人一样，她的萨迪在不同情境下既能表现出同情心，也能展现出冷酷的一面。

source: but not every homicide is a murder . " Homicide " is the killing of one person by another person . " Murder " is a criminal legal concept , usually involving intentional killing of one person by another without justification . Killing of one person by another by accident , self-defense , or capital punishment are all homicides but are not murder ; these either lack intent or are justified .
domestication: 但不是所有的杀人行为都是谋杀。“杀人”是指一个人被另一个人致死。“谋杀”则是刑法上的概念，通常指一个人故意且无正当理由地杀害另一个人。如果一个人因意外、自卫或执行死刑而致他人死亡，这些都属于杀人，但不算谋杀；因为要么缺乏故意，要么有正当理由。
foreignization: 但并非每一起杀人案都是谋杀。“杀人”是指一个人被另一个人致死。“谋杀”是一个刑事法律概念，通常涉及一个人在没有正当理由的情况下故意杀害另一个人。一个人因事故、自卫或死刑而被另一个人致死，这些都是杀人案，但不是谋杀；这些要么缺乏意图，要么是正当的。

source: Nice article Meghan . Even Product Management does marketing now as evidenced by your thoughtful post . As an Internet marketer , I love the fact that Marketing budgets are growing on the leading edge of the economic recovery . Smart businesses see marketing as an investment opportunity to capture and grow market share . Marry that with smart technologies to implement inbound marketing efficiently through automation , resulting in each additional marketing $ going further while tracking that against investments . Another powerful effect of marketing automation is to bring sales and marketing together in a way that is both effective and efficient while maximizing ROI . Thanks for sharing .
domestication: 好文章，梅根！现在产品管理也做营销了，这从你这篇深思熟虑的文章中就能看出来。作为互联网营销者，我很高兴看到，在经济复苏的前沿，营销预算正在增加。聪明的企业把营销视为抓住和扩大市场份额的投资机会。再结合智能技术，通过自动化高效实施内容营销，让每一分额外的营销投入都能发挥更大的效果，并能追踪投资回报。营销自动化的另一个强大效果是，将销售和营销以一种既有效又高效的方式结合起来，最大化投资回报率。感谢分享！
foreignization: 不错的文章，梅根。就连产品管理也在做市场营销了，这从你深思熟虑的帖子中可以看出来。作为一名互联网营销人员，我喜欢营销预算在经济复苏的前沿增长这一事实。聪明的企业将营销视为一种投资机会，以获取并扩大市场份额。结合智能技术，通过自动化高效地实施入站营销，使每增加的营销美元都能走得更远，同时针对这些投资进行跟踪。营销自动化的另一个强大效应是将销售和营销以一种既有效又高效的方式结合起来，同时最大化投资回报率。谢谢分享。

source: Groupon just has n't evolved , and they have n't put all the data they have accrued to good use , as far as I can see . When we look at what will shape e-commerce in the future , data is at the center of it : loyalty data , customer relationship management data , site visitation and cookie data -- all of it . The challenge with Groupon is that they 're still all about offering everyone the same deal at the same price . They 're not targeting their pricing based on how often someone has shopped with them in the past . They 're not offering things that are specifically customized to their audience . That 's disappointing .
domestication: 团购网就是没跟上时代的步伐，他们手头的数据也没好好利用起来，至少我是这么看的。未来电子商务的风向标，说到底还是数据：客户忠诚度数据、客户关系管理数据、网站访问和Cookie数据等等，都得用上。团购网的问题在于，他们还是一刀切，给所有人提供同样的优惠，同样的价格。他们没有根据顾客过去的购买频次来调整价格，也没有针对他们的受众推出定制化的产品。这可真是让人失望。
foreignization: Groupon就是没有进化，他们没有充分利用他们积累的所有数据，至少据我所见是这样。当我们展望未来将塑造电子商务的因素时，数据处于中心位置：忠诚度数据、客户关系管理数据、网站访问和cookie数据——所有这些。Groupon的问题在于他们仍然在提供同样的价格给所有人相同的优惠。他们没有根据某人过去购物的频率来调整定价。他们没有提供专门针对其受众定制的东西。这令人失望。

The challenge with Groupon is that they 're still all about offering everyone the same deal at the same price . They 're not targeting their pricing based on how often someone has shopped with them in the past . They 're not offering things that are specifically customized to their audience . That 's disappointing .

source: Most of us want to make our living spaces inviting and comfortable , but what exactly does it mean to make a room warm ? If you 're not quite sure , we 're here to help . By making a few adjustments to a room 's color scheme , lighting , furniture arrangement and decorative accessories , you can change the mood and atmosphere of the room completely . Here are some tips to make your apartment feel warm and cozy .

foreignization: 我们大多数人都希望让我们的居住空间变得温馨舒适，但究竟如何才能让一个房间变得温暖呢？如果你不太确定，我们在这里提供帮助。通过调整房间的色彩搭配、照明、家具布局和装饰配件，你可以完全改变房间的氛围和情调。以下是一些让你的公寓感觉温暖舒适的建议。

Most of us want to make our living spaces inviting and comfortable , but what exactly does it mean to make a room warm ? If you 're not quite sure , we 're here to help . By making a few adjustments to a room 's color scheme , lighting , furniture arrangement and decorative accessories , you can change the mood and atmosphere of the room completely . Here are some tips to make your apartment feel warm and cozy .
大多数人想要把家布置得温馨舒适，但怎么才算把房间弄得有温度呢？如果你还不太清楚，那就让我们来支招吧。只要对房间的颜色、灯光、家具摆放和装饰品稍作调整，就能完全改变房间的氛围。下面就是一些让公寓变得温暖舒适的小贴士。

source: i do n't know ... i do n't buy that they have the right to arrest , detain and strip search an individual just because someone says they think that person might be a terrorist ... this is the problem with profiling. someone could easily report me just because i look muslim and foreign ( it has happened to me , but thankfully i was n't detained or anything , and the cops were very nice ) . and i should be understanding of being strip searched because they have to make sure i 'm not a terrorist ? ? ? shoshana 's story makes my blood boil , i 'm sorry ... i have no problem complying with extra security measures , i 've been docile as a dove with my TSA encounters and i 'll even understand a little extra attention based on mine and my hubby 's " muslim " appearance , whatever . but something like this ? hellz to the no. just my opinion .  Exillior
domestication: 我不信这套……他们凭什么能因为有人怀疑某个人可能是恐怖分子就去逮捕、关押甚至搜身？这就是所谓“形象定性”的问题。随便谁都能因为我长得像穆斯林或外国人而举报我（这种事我经历过，幸好没被关起来，警察还很友好）。难道我就应该乖乖接受脱衣检查，因为他们要确保我不是恐怖分子？？？舒珊娜的故事让我气得不行，真是抱歉……我对额外的安检措施没意见，每次遇到TSA的检查我都温顺得像只鸽子，即使因为我和老公看起来像穆斯林而受到一点特别关注我也能理解。但这种事情？绝对不行！这只是我的看法。Exillior
foreignization: 我不知道……我不认为他们有权仅仅因为有人认为某人可能是恐怖分子就可以逮捕、拘留和搜查个人……这就是种族侧写的问题。有人很容易仅仅因为我看起来像穆斯林和外国人就举报我（这种情况发生过，但幸运的是我没有被拘留或怎么样，警察也很友善）。而我应该理解被脱衣搜查是因为他们必须确保我不是恐怖分子？？？索尚娜的故事让我怒火中烧，对不起……我对遵守额外的安全措施没有任何问题，我在与TSA的接触中一直像鸽子一样温顺，我甚至可以理解基于我和我老公的“穆斯林”外貌会受到一点额外的关注，无论怎样都行。但像这样的事情？见鬼去吧。这只是我的意见。 Exillior

source: After your success in the adult fiction world , why make the switch to a YA novel ? This is n't a switch from adult to YA as much as it 's an addition . I 've also written nonfiction ( Write Away ) , short stories ( I , Richard ) , and have edited two anthologies . So this was a challenge to myself at the same time as it was an opportunity to use an incredible setting that has been begging me to make it part of a book since I first moved to Whidbey Island in 2005 .
domestication: 你在成人小说界已经取得了成功，为什么还要转向青少年小说呢？其实这并不是从成人小说转到青少年小说，而是增加了新的尝试。我还写过非虚构作品（《写在远方》），短篇故事（《我，理查德》），还编辑了两本合集。所以这对我来说既是一个挑战，也是一个机会，让我能用上这个绝妙的背景。自从2005年搬到惠德贝岛，这个地方就一直央求着我要把它写进书里。
foreignization: 在你成功进入成人小说界之后，为什么转而写青少年小说？这并不是从成人小说转向青少年小说，而是一种增加。我还写过非小说类作品（《Write Away》），短篇故事（《I, Richard》），还编辑了两本选集。所以这对我来说既是一个挑战，也是一个机会，可以利用一个自2005年我搬到惠德贝岛以来就一直渴望成为书中一部分的不可思议的背景。

source: Yet when some experimenters proposed taking genetic material from viruses and seeing if E. coli K12 would pick it up , microbiologists expressed alarm because they feared that genetically enhanced K12 might come into contact with the other strain of E. coli that inhabits a small portion of human intestines and create a human health hazard .
domestication: 有些实验人员提出，将病毒的遗传物质引入大肠杆菌K12，看它是否会吸收。这引起了微生物学家的警觉，他们担心这种经过基因改造的K12可能会与人体肠道中少量存在的另一种大肠杆菌接触，从而引发健康风险。毕竟，不怕一万就怕万一嘛。
foreignization: 然而，当一些实验者提出从病毒中提取遗传物质并观察大肠杆菌K12是否会吸收时，微生物学家表示担忧，因为他们担心基因增强的K12可能会与栖息在人类肠道一小部分的另一种大肠杆菌接触，从而造成人体健康危害。

Yet when some experimenters proposed taking genetic material from viruses and seeing if E. coli K12 would pick it up , microbiologists expressed alarm because they feared that genetically enhanced K12 might come into contact with the other strain of E. coli that inhabits a small portion of human intestines and create a human health hazard .

Yet when some experimenters proposed taking genetic material from viruses and seeing if E. coli K12 would pick it up , microbiologists expressed alarm because they feared that genetically enhanced K12 might come into contact with the other strain of E. coli that inhabits a small portion of human intestines and create a human health hazard .
然而，当一些实验者提出从病毒中提取遗传物质并观察大肠杆菌K12是否会吸收时，微生物学家表示担忧，因为他们担心基因增强的K12可能会与栖息在人类肠道一小部分的另一种大肠杆菌接触，从而造成人体健康危害。

source: This whole situation is criminally tragic . It would not have happened if the US were the US of 1941 . We would have nuked Tehran , Saudi Arabia , Afganistan and maybe Iraq . Instead , America did n't rebuild the WTC , wallows in self-pity and " Chamberlain-esque " appeasement of her enemies . America , her last vestiges , are gone , as you have discovered . She was once the oak tree , but in the winds of Sept 11 , she snapped , only to reveal that the inside was a blackened , rotted hollow .  M
domestication: 这种情况真是悲剧得让人心痛。要是现在还是1941年的美国，我们早就对德黑兰、沙特阿拉伯、阿富汗，甚至伊拉克动用核武了。可现在，美国不但没重建世贸中心，反而沉浸在自怨自艾中，对敌人采取“张伯伦式”的绥靖政策。美国最后的一点尊严和力量也荡然无存，你已经看到了。她曾经是一棵参天大树，但在9·11的风暴中轰然倒塌，露出里面早已腐朽不堪的空洞。
foreignization: 这种情况实在是罪恶的悲剧。如果美国还是1941年的美国，这一切本不会发生。我们本会用核弹轰炸德黑兰、沙特阿拉伯、阿富汗，也许还有伊拉克。然而，美国并没有重建世贸中心，而是沉溺于自怜和“张伯伦式的”对敌人的绥靖。美国，她的最后残余，已经消失，正如你所发现的那样。她曾经是橡树，但在9月11日的风暴中，她折断了，只露出内部已经变黑、腐烂的空洞。M

source: Isaac Barchas has been the director of the Austin Technology Incubator since 2006 and has developed the team that has grown ATI 3x . Previously he spent 8 years with McKinsley and Company where he focused on business building in industries such as biotechnology , software , wireless telecoms and internet retail . He is also an active board member for the Pecan Street Project , Austin Technology Council and the Central Texas Emerging Technology Fund .
domestication: 以撒·巴查斯自2006年起担任奥斯汀技术孵化器的主任，带领团队将ATI的规模扩大了三倍。此前，他在麦肯锡公司工作了8年，专注于生物技术、软件、无线通信和互联网零售等行业的业务发展。他还是佩坎街项目、奥斯汀技术委员会和中央德克萨斯新兴技术基金的活跃董事会成员。

source: If you were a scientist , or at least if you acted like one , you 'd go to the literature and note the abundance of studies demonstrating no adverse effects of GMOs in the diet ( many of them ... independant ) , you 'd likely then accept that your reactions to corn products ( when did they arise by the by ? ) have absolutely nothing to do with the presence of GMOs .

source: Josh : I would agree that as a profession we tend to get way too focused on issues like land use and transportation due to the historic role that those elements have played for planners . For me personally as a younger planner and someone who is still a " rookie " in the field , I 've definitely watched the profession evolve from that of a technical focus to a profession that is expected to have more critical interaction with people and communities .
domestication: Josh：我同意，作为这个职业的一员，我们确实太过于关注土地使用和交通这些问题了，这主要是因为这些方面在规划历史中的重要地位。我自己作为一个年轻的规划师，还是个“新手”，确实见证了这个行业从技术导向转变为更加重视与人和社区的互动。这变化挺大的，也挺好的，毕竟规划最终还是要落到人身上，不是吗？
foreignization: Josh : 我同意，作为职业，我们倾向于过于关注土地使用和交通等问题，这是由于这些元素在规划师历史角色中所起的作用。对我来说，作为一名年轻的规划师，也是这个领域的一个“新手”，我确实观察到这个职业已经从技术焦点转变为一个需要与人和社区进行更多批判性互动的职业。

source: What harm I do to others ? I do n't care . Yes , I have the right to not to care because I do n't trust scientists . This is my personal opinion . I do n't ask people to not to care . I do n't say scientists are right by saying GMOs are safe . I just say I do n't believe scientists . I do n't force people to eat GMOs or not to eat GMOs . I do n't argue GMOs are safe or not . Because I think if they are labelled , I would have the chance to vote by my money .
domestication: 我害了谁？我才不在乎呢。没错，我有权利不在乎，因为我压根不信科学家那一套。这只是我个人的看法，我也没要求别人也跟我一样不在乎。我说科学家说转基因食品安全就是对的吗？我只是说我就是不信他们的话。我不会强迫别人吃或不吃转基因食品，也不会跟人争辩转基因食品到底安不安全。因为我觉得，要是能标注清楚，我就能用自己的钱来投上一票。
foreignization: 我给他人造成了什么伤害？我不在乎。是的，我有权利不在乎，因为我 distrust 科学家。这是我的个人意见。我不要求人们不在乎。我说科学家说转基因食品是安全的是正确的，并不是我要表达的意思。我只是说我并不相信科学家。我不会强迫人们吃或不吃转基因食品。我不会争论转基因食品是否安全。因为我认为如果它们被贴上标签，我就可以用我的钱来投票。

source: A veteran leader in the environmental movement , Carl Pope is the former executive director and chairman of the Sierra Club . source: " Last Train Home " is about Chinese family fractured by factory life . The parents , too poor to support their infant daughter , decide to move to the city and send their wages home . Their daughter is a teenager when the film begins . She is angry that she does n't know her own parents , deciding whether to stay in school or go on to factory work against their wishes , and mourning the death of the grandfather who raised her . The family reunites only once a year -- a trip made possible by China 's extensive train system . The film captures that trip again and again . Chinese New Year produces the world 's largest human migration .
domestication: 《归途列车》讲述了一个因工厂生活而支离破碎的中国家庭的故事。父母因为太穷，养不起刚出生的女儿，决定进城打工，将工资寄回家。电影开始时，女儿已经是个十几岁的少女了。她对不认识自己的亲生父母感到愤怒，违背他们的意愿，决定是否继续上学还是去工厂工作，同时还为把她带大的爷爷去世而哀伤。这个家一年只团聚一次，这全靠中国庞大的铁路网才得以实现。电影一遍又一遍地记录了这个旅程。春节时，全世界最大规模的人口迁徙就在这里上演。
foreignization: 《Last Train Home》讲述了因工厂生活而支离破碎的一个中国家庭。父母因为太穷无法抚养年幼的女儿，决定搬到城市工作并将工资寄回家。电影开始时，他们的女儿已经是一个青少年。她对自己的父母感到愤怒，因为他们不认识她，她违背他们的意愿决定是否继续上学还是去工厂工作，并哀悼养育她的祖父的去世。这个家庭每年只团聚一次——这是一次由中国庞大的铁路系统支持的旅行。电影反复捕捉了这一旅程。春节产生了世界上最大规模的人口迁徙。

source: Still , the article I wrote was , I believe , the best of my options for discussing the subject . I did n't have ten thousand words to use to explore its full complexity . I certainly was n't going to get many readers if I wrote a scientific journal paper . And waiting for fifty years to see if this research holds up seems like a worse option as well . So I had to fall short . Again . And I will take the criticism that my article triggers and try to do a better job the next time around .
domestication: 话说回来，我写的文章，自认为已经是讨论这个话题的最佳选择了。毕竟，我没有几万字来剖析它的复杂性。要是写成科学期刊论文，估计也没几个人愿意看。再说，等五十年再看这研究靠不靠谱，显然也不是个好主意。所以，只能将就了。又一次。对于文章引发的批评，我会虚心接受，争取下次做得更好。

如果你只是认为我错了，我对此无能为力。如果你看看事实，我相信你将不得不承认，这些页岩油气田的风险比运营商所表示的要大得多。如果你同意这一点，那么我就满意地认为我已经达到了我的目的。如果最终我是错的，那也没办法。我根据我所掌握的事实说出我所看到的真相。如果事实改变，我会改变我对它们的解读。这是一个动态的情况。

source: At the Perelman School of Medicine , he supervises all aspects of the medical student curriculum , chairs the curriculum committee , supervises the medical student scholarly pursuit program in clinical investigation , and serves on the Student Standards Committee and chairs the School of Medicine Teaching Awards Committee . source: I am willing to confess on this subject . On more than one occasion I have not given credit where credit 's due , I have n't acknowledged my influences and the prior work of others . I 'm not proud of that , even though it can easily happen to anyone , especially a relatively sloppy thinker like me . They were mistakes and I 've tried to own up to them . It has n't always been easy .

source: the thing that i liked about blogging , when i was really into personal blogs about 3 years ago , was that often i was reading someones blog for months even before i figured out what colour they were . for me , it was a really democratic way of getting insights into loads of different viewpoints and lives and backgrounds .

the thing that i liked about blogging , when i was really into personal blogs about 3 years ago , was that often i was reading someones blog for months even before i figured out what colour they were . for me , it was a really democratic way of getting insights into loads of different viewpoints and lives and backgrounds .
我喜欢博客的一点是，当我三年前真正热衷于个人博客时，很多时候我在阅读某人的博客几个月后才弄清楚他们的肤色。对我来说，这是一种非常民主的方式，可以深入了解许多不同的观点、生活和背景。

source: No , Thomas Hamilton ... nobody should have to go through a " slight inconvenience " just because we are bombing the hell out of the Middle East . It 's not worth it . It starts with 1 person being inconvenienced , then 2 , then 10 , then 1,000 , then 100,000 then we are putting people of certain ethnic background into camps . Fascism will come to America wrapped in an American flag . You need to foresee the bigger picture when you say things like that , Thomas .
domestication: 不，托马斯·汉密尔顿……我们不能因为要轰炸中东，就让任何人承受所谓的“小麻烦”。这根本不值得。一开始是一个人不方便，然后是两个人，十个人，一千个人，十万个人，最后就会发展到把某些种族背景的人关进集中营。法西斯主义可能会披着美国国旗的外衣来到美国。托马斯，你说话时得想想后果，得看到更大的图景。

source: Political power in Pakistan has usually rested with an educated , liberal , and often wealthy elite -- at least when the country was not under military rule . With his push to roll back the country 's blasphemy laws , Punjab Governor Salman Taseer epitomized what radicals view as an alarming secular drift in Pakistan .
domestication: 在巴基斯坦，政治权力通常掌握在受过教育、思想开明且往往富裕的精英手中——至少在国家未处于军事统治时是这样。旁遮普省长萨尔曼·塔塞爾推动废除亵渎法，这在他看来，正是激进分子所担忧的巴基斯坦世俗化倾向的体现。
foreignization: 巴基斯坦的政治权力通常掌握在受过教育、自由派且往往富裕的精英手中——至少在该国未处于军事统治之下时是如此。旁遮普省省长萨尔曼·塔塞尔推动撤销该国的亵渎神明法，这体现了激进分子视为巴基斯坦令人担忧的世俗化倾向的典型代表。

Political power in Pakistan has usually rested with an educated , liberal , and often wealthy elite -- at least when the country was not under military rule . With his push to roll back the country 's blasphemy laws , Punjab Governor Salman Taseer epitomized what radicals view as an alarming secular drift in Pakistan .

source: John Makdessi picked apart fellow Canadian Sam Stout in the bout in Montreal . Makdessi utilized a jab to keep Stout at range and managed to use strong takedown defense to negate the improving ground game of " Hands of Stone . " The win snapped a two-fight losing streak for Makdessi and dropped Stout to 1-2 in his last three .
domestication: 约翰·马克德西在蒙特利尔的比赛中彻底击败了同为加拿大人的山姆·斯托特。马克德西用刺拳控制距离，还凭借出色的防摔技术化解了“铁石之手”斯托特日益精进的地面技巧。这场胜利让马克德西结束了连败的颓势，而斯托特近三场比赛的成绩则变成了1胜2负。
foreignization: 约翰·马克德西在蒙特利尔的比赛中拆解了同为加拿大人的山姆·斯托特。马克德西利用刺拳保持与斯托特的距离，并成功使用强大的防摔技术来抵消“石手”的日益进步的地面技巧。这场胜利结束了马克德西的两连败，并使斯托特在过去三场比赛中的战绩下滑至1胜2负。

source: Defenses for both teams will probably produce most of the highlights for this game and with the fourth-best pass defense in the NFL , the Cardinals should remain a good play after picking off Matt Ryan five times last week . They may find the going a little tough to sustain , though , if Lindley struggles and they are forced to be on the field longer .
domestication: 两队的防守估计会成为这场比赛的亮点。红雀队有着联盟第四好的传球防守，上一场还五次截获了马特·瑞恩的传球，这次应该还能有不错的表现。不过，如果林德利表现不佳，他们可能就有点吃力了，毕竟防守时间拖得太长对谁都不是好事。

source: I disagree Vanguy . If they had an " exclusive " agreement , you would be right . But she " assumed " he was n't still looking . Not the same thing . So I would say , if you want to be the only one , say so . If he agrees , than he has to stop looking . If he does n't agree , then she has to either settle for what he 's willing to give , or , better yet , keep looking for her match .
domestication: 我不同意Vanguy的说法。如果他们签了“独家”协议，你这话说得没错。但问题是她只是“以为”他不会再找了，这完全是两码事。所以啊，我想说，如果你想当唯一的那一个，就得说出来。如果他同意了，那他就得停止寻找。如果他不同意，那她要么就接受他的条件，要么还是自己再找找，找个更合适的也挺好。
foreignization: 我不同意Vanguy的看法。如果他们有“独家”协议，你就是对的。但她只是“假设”他不再寻找了。这可不是一回事。所以我说，如果你想成为唯一的一个，就明说。如果他同意，那么他就必须停止寻找。如果他不同意，那么她要么接受他愿意给予的，或者，更好的是，继续寻找她的匹配对象。

If he does n't agree , then she has to either settle for what he 's willing to give , or , better yet , keep looking for her match .

source: Cathy , you are the epitome of what is wrong with this country . She is a CITIZEN , you moron . She was subjected to abject degradation by people who fit all those things she does n't like . source: Because we pay for all kinds of things meant for the common good . I do n't have kids in school anymore , but I do n't begrudge money for public education . My parents are both dead , but I do n't begrudge paying for the Medicaid your parents might need for a nursing home . My kids are healthy and strong , but I do n't begrudge paying for the disability services that help people who are n't . It 's the right thing to do .
domestication: 我们出钱支持各种公共福利。我家孩子已经不在上学了，但我从不心疼给公立教育的钱。我父母都过世了，但我也不介意为别人家老人的医保和养老院掏腰包。我家孩子健康强壮，但我也不吝啬为那些需要残障服务的人贡献一份力量。这都是应该做的。
foreignization: 因为我们支付各种为了公共利益的事物。我的孩子已经不在学校了，但我并不吝啬为公立教育花钱。我的父母都已去世，但我不介意为你父母可能需要的养老院支付医疗补助。我的孩子们健康强壮，但我不吝啬为帮助那些有残疾的人支付残疾服务费。这是正确的事情。

source: One of the headlines this week from the IEA Report suggests that the United States will be the top global oil producer in five years . Yet back in DeSoto Parish in Louisiana , where the Haynesville Shale discovery in 2008 started the bonanza , revenues are now falling and school board budgets are strapped as the end of the glory days are beginning to appear .
domestication: 本周国际能源署的报告中有一条消息指出，美国将在五年内成为全球最大的石油生产国。然而，在路易斯安那州的德索托教区，2008年海恩斯维尔页岩气的发现曾掀起了一场财富盛宴，如今收入却在下降，学校董事会的预算也捉襟见肘，好日子似乎快要到头了。
foreignization: 本周国际能源署报告的一个头条新闻指出，美国将在五年内成为全球最大的石油生产国。然而，在路易斯安那州的德索托教区，2008年海恩斯维尔页岩的发现启动了这场盛宴，如今收入正在下降，学校董事会预算紧张，辉煌时代的终结开始显现。

source: Internal tobacco documents portray an industry that recognized these enhanced graphic warning labels as a " global threat , " according to the study . Shortly after they were first proposed by Swedish health ministers in 1976 , an executive at Phillip Morris drafted a plan to thwart the spread of such labels , and many of the companies joined together to form international task forces to stop efforts to further health warning labels .
domestication: 内部烟草文件显示，烟草行业将这些加强版的图文警示标签视为“全球威胁”。据研究，1976年瑞典卫生部长首次提出这一建议后不久，菲利普莫里斯的一位高管便起草了一份计划，试图阻止这类标签的推广。许多公司还联合起来，成立国际工作组，以阻挠进一步加强健康警告标签的努力。

source: My point was primarily that Joe Consumer is n't going to have an easy time assessing which scientists and studies are " legit . " If he reads an article about cattle dying after grazing on Bt cotton or sees a study identifying GM-related toxins entering our blood stream , he 'll likely find that alarming . He most likely does n't know that the toxin targets a molecule that is absent in humans ( if I understand Ewan correctly -- and thanks , Ewan , for that point of clarification ) .
domestication: 我的意思是，普通消费者孙大民不会容易判断哪些科学家和研究是“靠谱”的。他要是看到文章说牛吃了Bt棉花后死掉，或者看到研究指出转基因相关的毒素进入我们血液，肯定会觉得很可怕。他多半不知道这种毒素针对的分子在人体里是没有的（如果我理解Ewan的说法没错的话——感谢Ewan的解释）。
foreignization: 我的观点主要是乔·消费者不会容易评估哪些科学家和研究是“合法的”。如果他读到一篇关于牛在食用Bt棉花后死亡的文章，或者看到一项研究指出转基因相关的毒素进入我们的血液，他很可能会觉得这很令人担忧。他很可能不知道这种毒素针对的分子在人体中并不存在（如果我正确理解了伊万的话——感谢伊万的这一点澄清）。

He most likely does n't know that the toxin targets a molecule that is absent in humans ( if I understand Ewan correctly -- and thanks , Ewan , for that point of clarification ) .

source: We went to a Catholic school but my debate partner , while Catholic , was completely unschooled in the bible and started to freak out during the 30 minute prep session . It took me 5 minutes to calm her down and to come up with a way of turning this on its head . We decided to turn that debate topic into a recommendation to change the batting order of the NY Yankees upcoming game and " prove " that the Yankees would have a better shot at winning if the batting order were reversed . Let 's just put it this way : my debate partner was a Yankees expert , knew all the stats . She was game !
domestication: 我们上的是天主教学校，但我的辩论搭档虽然是天主教徒，对《圣经》却一窍不通。在准备的三十分钟里，她开始慌了神。我花了五分钟才让她冷静下来，并想出了一个办法来反败为胜。我们决定把辩论题目变成建议纽约扬基队调整即将进行的比赛的击球顺序，并“证明”如果击球顺序颠倒，扬基队赢球的机会会更大。这么说吧：我的搭档是个扬基队的专家，所有数据都了如指掌。她觉得这个主意挺好玩，立马就同意了！

source: If there are n't protections for all Americans against this kind of abuse of power ( from wherever it stems , or is allowed , ) then soon none of us will be protected from frivolous encroachments on our rights -- for any reason , or none at all . The only entity which can protect our rights is us -- united together .
domestication: 如果没有对所有美国人进行这种权力滥用的保护（无论这种滥用来自哪里，或是被允许），那么很快我们每个人的权益都会受到无缘无故的侵犯——不管是出于什么原因，还是毫无理由。保护我们的权利只能靠我们自己，团结起来才能有力量。
foreignization: 如果没有对所有美国人针对这种权力滥用（无论其来源或被允许）的保护，那么很快我们所有人都将无法免受对我们权利的无理侵犯——无论出于任何原因，还是毫无理由。唯一能够保护我们权利的实体就是我们自己——团结在一起。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

If there are n't protections for all Americans against this kind of abuse of power ( from wherever it stems , or is allowed , ) then soon none of us will be protected from frivolous encroachments on our rights -- for any reason , or none at all . The only entity which can protect our rights is us -- united together .
如果没有对所有美国人进行这种权力滥用的保护（无论这种滥用来自哪里，或是被允许），那么很快我们每个人的权益都会受到无缘无故的侵犯——不管是出于什么原因，还是毫无理由。保护我们的权利只能靠我们自己，团结起来才能有力量。

source: In reference to the comment about Man O ' War being a " hophead " , IF that were the case , he lived to be 30 years old , good health , no break downs , the greatest sire of all time , hard to believe a drugged up horse came away so well . source: If people agree it 's a problem , there 's a simple solution that requires no technical changes : Moderators agree ( and announce ) to be more hard-ass on the obit posts . Do n't green-light the one-liners , say " come back with a fleshed out obit " , and one comes along . After a while , people see " MARTON FILBRANSTER , 1949-2012 " does n't work , and seriously , it 's less than 30 minutes of work to put together a crazy insane detailed post , and less than that to do a really decent one . But if a one-liner gets posted , the work stops .
domestication: 如果大家都觉得这是个问题，有个简单的解决办法，不需要任何技术改动：版主们可以商量一下，并宣布对讣告贴更严格把关。别让那些只有一两句话的帖子通过，告诉发帖人“回来写个详细的讣告”，等他们真写出来了再发。时间长了，大家就会发现“马顿·菲布兰斯特，1949-2012”这种帖子行不通。说实话，花不到半小时就能整理出一篇非常详细的内容，稍微好一点的甚至更快。但如果一个字都不多写，直接发那种简短的帖子，那后面的工作就停下了。
foreignization: 如果人们认为这是个问题，有一个简单的解决方案不需要任何技术改变：版主们同意（并宣布）对讣告帖子更加严格。不要批准那些简短的帖子，而是说“回来提交一个内容丰富的讣告”，直到有人这样做了。过了一段时间，人们会看到“MARTON FILBRANSTER，1949-2012”这样的帖子行不通，而且说实话，花不到30分钟的时间就能整理出一个疯狂详细的文章，而写一篇真正不错的文章所需的时间更短。但如果发布了一个简短的帖子，工作就会停止。

source: Following 9-11 , my first few trips through airport security were much different . My first flight was just after planes were allowed to fly again , and there were some in the media warning of racial profiling . During that first trip , not only was n't I checked , when I passed the security personnel that checked bags for chemical substance , the officers actually turned away from me . While it was a nice change , I did n't think it was going to last . It did n't .
domestication: 9·11之后，我头几次过机场安检感觉大不一样。第一次坐飞机是在航班重新开放不久，当时媒体上都在说可能会有针对某些种族的特殊检查。那次安检时，不仅没人查我，我还发现，当经过检查行李化学物质的安全人员时，他们竟然转过了身去，没理我。虽然这种待遇挺新鲜，但我觉得不会长久。果然，后来就不一样了。

During that first trip , not only was n't I checked , when I passed the security personnel that checked bags for chemical substance , the officers actually turned away from me . While it was a nice change , I did n't think it was going to last . It did n't .
9·11之后，我最初几次通过机场安检的经历大不相同。我的第一次飞行是在飞机再次被允许飞行后不久，媒体中有些人警告可能会有种族定性。在那第一次旅行中，不仅我没有被检查，当我经过那些检查行李中有无化学物质的安全人员时，那些官员实际上还转过身去。虽然这是一个不错的改变，但我不认为这会持续下去。确实没有持续。

source: People with privilege , either racial or class/economic , can refuse to cooperate and have that refusal be seen as exercising their rights . Unfortunately , most of the time when people of color or or lower SES exercise their right to not cooperate , it 's most often seen as " resisting arrest " or refusal to cooperate for nefarious reasons .
domestication: 有权有势的人，无论是种族还是经济上的优势，可以选择不合作，而且这种拒绝还会被视为是在行使自己的权利。可惜的是，大多数时候，当有色人种或低社会经济地位的人选择不合作时，却常常被看作是“抗拒逮捕”或是出于不正当的理由拒绝合作。
foreignization: 拥有特权的人，无论是种族特权还是阶级/经济特权，可以拒绝合作，并且这种拒绝被视为行使他们的权利。不幸的是，大多数时候，当有色人种或较低社会经济地位的人行使他们不合作的权利时，这通常被视为“抗拒逮捕”或出于不良动机而拒绝合作。

source: However , speaking as an urban cyclist , I can assure you that there are contexts in which we are far from being a " blame-obsessed society " . Specifically : Collisions and near-collisions between cyclists and motorists happen all the time , yet no one seems interested in determining whose fault they are .

source: ( MS ) : Undoubtedly , the most rewarding aspect of this job is helping people . Sometimes the work is tough and grueling and it requires a lot of dedication . Recently , we had a big win for our community . Since 2006 , I have been working with State Rep. Mike McGeehan , Councilman Bobby Henon , and the Holmesburg and Upper Holmesburg Civic Associations to transform a dilapidated former public housing site into dorms and athletic fields for Holy Family University . The site will also include senior housing , retail shops , and restaurants .
domestication: （MS）：这份工作的最大收获无疑是帮助别人。有时候工作确实辛苦，得付出很多心血。最近，我们社区取得了重大胜利。自2006年起，我就和州议员迈克·麦基汉、市议员鲍比·亨农，还有霍姆斯伯格及上霍姆斯伯格市民协会一起，努力将一个破败的旧公共住房区改造成圣家大学的学生宿舍和运动场。这个项目还包括老年人住宅、零售商店和餐馆。
foreignization: ( MS ) : 毫无疑问，这份工作的最有回报的方面是帮助人们。有时工作很艰苦，需要很大的奉献精神。最近，我们为社区取得了一项重大胜利。自2006年以来，我一直与州议员迈克·麦基汉、市议员鲍比·亨农以及霍姆斯伯格和上霍姆斯伯格市民协会合作，将一个破旧的前公共住房地点改造成圣家大学的学生宿舍和运动场。该地点还将包括老年人住房、零售商店和餐馆。

The site will also include senior housing , retail shops , and restaurants .

source: From most people here who think GMO is 100 per cent safe it looks as if my prediction is right but gut destroying GMO spliced material that takes out insects is not responsible for humans with gut problems and Iam still hoping for at least one person here to recommend investigation of GMO causation even if onlyto rule it out .

source: Germany , in order to pay reparations for its war DEBTS , was sending its gold , and material goods to France . For internal banking , paper ' currency ' was exploited to cover the drain of real value to the money supply . Hyperinflation set in , and that twenty million mark fortune , if not held in GOLD , lost ALL VALUE in just ten years !

source: As for talking snakes , there was also a talking donkey as well . It was not the snake or donkey itself who talked , but the angelic or demonic entity controlling it who spake from it . Even King Solomon in The Testamnet of Solomon and The Lesser Key of Solomon possesed a talisman that allowed him to communicate with animals as if they could speak directly to him . This ritual has been in the practice of black magic for centuries , though so called witches to my knowledge have ever been able to tak directly to animals . Solomon 's ring and talisman was of angelic messengers , not made from human hands .

source: The Braves bullpen performed admirably in the face of overuse and injuries . Projected closer Rafael Soriano was a non-factor for much of the season with a mysterious elbow ailment . A success story in 2007 , Peter Moylan was out by mid-April with Tommy John surgery of his own . Mike Gonzalez returned midway through the season to assume the closer 's role and re-established himself as a late inning force . Will Ohman , Jeff Bennett and Blaine Boyer provided the majority of the middle relief work , all making more than 70 appearances .

source: And further there is no discussion , here , as far as I can see , with Amanda , other than between Amanda and Holly . There is just Amanda , saying the same things over and over , insisting that the reason she wo n't be reading BFP anymore is because she , Amanda , has decided not to , as if she can will BFP 's blog back into existence for the sheer purpose of not reading it . Which is erasing BFP 's work all over again . And then there are a lot of other people , begging her to get out of her own way and really look at the situation .

source: I entered the Church through a Paulist-run parish . Having been Episcopalian for 13 yrs before this , I knew the basics of catholicism . . . and I was a good mainstream left-liberal . But even I was surprised when our Paulist associate pastor told the RCIA group that VC1 was basically a power-grab by the Pope b/c Italian troops were knocking on the Vatican 's door and nothing else happened at that Council . When I noted that papal infallibility was defined by that Council , Father said , " Oh that . Nobody believes that ! "
domestication: 我是通过一个保罗会管理的堂区进入天主教会的。在这之前，我当了13年的圣公会教徒，对天主教的基本知识还是懂一些的。而且，我一直算是个主流的左派自由主义者。但即使这样，当我们的保罗会助理神父在慕道班上说，梵蒂冈第一届大公会议基本上就是教皇为了夺权搞的一场戏，因为当时意大利军队正兵临梵蒂冈城下，除此之外那次会议什么都没干，我还是吃了一惊。我提到那次大公会议定义了教皇不能错的道理，神父却说：“哦，那个啊，现在没人信这个了！”
foreignization: 我通过一个保禄会管理的堂区进入了教会。在我成为天主教徒之前的13年里，我是圣公会信徒，我知道天主教的基本知识……而且我是一个主流的左派自由主义者。但即使是我也感到惊讶，当我们保禄会的助理神父告诉RCIA小组，第一届梵蒂冈大公会议基本上是教皇因为意大利军队敲打着梵蒂冈的大门而进行的一次权力攫取，除此之外那次公会议没有发生其他事情。当我提到那次公会议定义了教宗无谬论时，神父说：“哦，那个。没有人相信这个！”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

When I noted that papal infallibility was defined by that Council , Father said , " Oh that . Nobody believes that ! "

source: I remember when GM introduced Dexcool , I went to a Buick new car intro for salespeople for the 96 model year and the entire meeting was about Dexcool . I thought to myself at the time , you 've got to be kidding me , an entire new car intro show and nothing is mentioned about the cars only Dexcool ? ? ? Then a few years later Dexcool turns into another GM disaster .
domestication: 我记得当通用汽车推出Dexcool的时候，我去参加了96款别克新车的销售介绍会，整个会议都在讲Dexcool。我当时心想，这得有多开玩笑啊，一个全新的车型发布会，竟然只字不提车，只讲Dexcool？？？结果几年后，Dexcool真成了通用的又一个大麻烦。

source: A player does n't have to be a future all-star or even a starter to be a brick . Just as long as you think he could be a productive player on a pennant winner , even a bench player , you should vote " brick " as long as you believe the player would not fetch a much better player in return . But if you think the prospect is going to be a bust , then he 's bait no matter how little you think the Cubs would get back in return .
domestication: 一个球员不必非得是未来的全明星或主力才能算是一块砖头。只要你觉得他能在一支争冠队伍中发挥作用，哪怕是替补球员，只要你不认为能拿他换到更好的球员，就应该投票选他为“砖头”。但如果你觉得这个新秀会成为水货，那他就只能是钓饵了，不管你觉得小熊队能拿他换回多少筹码。

source: Look , if our main concern is whether we might die in a terrorist act , we will lose this country . We must each be willing to die for our freedom or it will be taken from us . A strip search for the protection of the authorities ? I thought they were all heroes , which implies bravery and the willingness to lay down their lives for Constitutional principles .
domestication: 瞧，如果我们整天担心会不会死在恐怖袭击中，那这个国家就完了。我们必须每个人都有为自由而献身的准备，不然自由就会被夺走。为了保护当局就要进行脱衣搜身？我以为他们都是英雄呢，英雄就意味着要有勇气，愿意为宪法原则献出生命。

source: - My Facebook posts are being seen by half as many people . ( A statistic called Reach , which used to average about 400 people , is now down to 200 . I still have more than 2,000 fans , but only 1/10 of them are seeing my posts . ) Here 's a possible explanation that proves that I 'm not insane . All I know is bad news about the company 's stock price appears in the WSJ all too frequently . The company seems very concerned about its shareholders , but seems to have no compunction about screwing over Fan Page owners by limiting the number of our own Fans that we can reach .

source: In the 1970s , about 25 years after the original Oldsmobile Rocket V8 engine appeared , General Motors adopted a corporate policy of mixing and matching engines among car lines . Many Oldsmobile owners were surprised and outraged to find Chevrolet V8s under their hoods . Even though the Chevy engine was a newer , more sophisticated design , Olds owners were so soundly convinced of the Rocket 's superiority they took GM to court for misrepresenting its product . The matter was eventually resolved , but it was a demonstration of the power of mystique . The accountants did n't see the handwriting on the wall . And where is the Oldsmobile brand now ? And GM . In the dumper , that 's where !
domestication: 20世纪70年代，大约在Oldsmobile Rocket V8发动机问世25年后，通用汽车公司开始推行一种在不同车系中混用发动机的政策。许多Oldsmobile车主一打开引擎盖，发现里面装的是Chevrolet V8发动机，都感到十分惊讶和愤怒。尽管Chevy的发动机更新、更先进，但Olds的车主们坚信Rocket发动机更优秀，甚至把通用告上了法庭，指责其虚假宣传。这件事最终解决了，但也显示了品牌魅力的力量。财务人员却没有看到墙上的字。现在Oldsmobile这个牌子去哪儿了？还有通用呢？不都垮了吗！
foreignization: 在20世纪70年代，大约在最初的Oldsmobile Rocket V8发动机出现后的25年，通用汽车公司采取了一项企业政策，在各车型之间混搭发动机。许多Oldsmobile车主惊讶和愤怒地发现他们的引擎盖下装的是Chevrolet V8发动机。尽管Chevy发动机是一款更新、更先进的设计，但Olds车主如此坚定地认为Rocket的优越性，以至于将GM告上法庭，指责其产品存在误导性宣传。这件事最终得到了解决，但它展示了一种神秘感的力量。会计师们没有看到墙上的字迹。Oldsmobile品牌现在在哪里？还有GM呢？它们都在垃圾堆里！

The matter was eventually resolved , but it was a demonstration of the power of mystique . The accountants did n't see the handwriting on the wall . And where is the Oldsmobile brand now ? And GM . In the dumper , that 's where !

source: Is information sharing limited ? Information sharing should not be unduly limited , since erecting barriers to sharing creates stovepipes of information that might be helpful or even necessary to other agencies . Instead of returning to a pre-9/11 security mindset , we should encourage sharing with appropriate oversight .
domestication: 信息共享有限制吗？信息共享不应该被过度限制，因为设置障碍会导致信息孤岛的产生，这些信息可能对其他部门有帮助，甚至不可或缺。我们不应该回到9·11之前的那种封闭安全观念，而应该在适当的监管下鼓励共享。
foreignization: 信息共享是否受到限制？信息共享不应过度受限，因为建立共享障碍会形成可能对其他机构有帮助甚至必要的信息孤岛。我们不应回归到9/11之前的安保思维，而应鼓励在适当监督下的信息共享。

source: The Cochise County Sheriff 's Office , on October 5 , issued a statement that Sheriff Dever , at the time of his death , had a blood-alcohol level of 0.291 percent , three times the legal limit ( 0.08 ) in Arizona . ( A company in Indianapolis , Indiana called AIT Laboratories , performed the toxicological urine analysis in this case . ) In the prepared press release , the sheriff 's office informed the public that Sheriff Dever had been under " stress and pressure " due to the recent death of his 86-year-old mother , and the upcoming deployment of one of his sons to Afghanistan .

source: With Monsanto playing defense , fortress mentality , ' wait out ' the enemy . Everyone in the world is afraid of Greenpeace ' unkind attentions , when in point of fact the Amsterdam multinational is completely vulnerable . An intelligent assault on their position would bring them down in three months .
domestication: 孟山都在防守，摆出一副铁桶阵，想耗过敌人。全世界都怕绿色和平组织的不友好关注，其实这家阿姆斯特丹的跨国公司十分脆弱。只要策略得当，三个月就能让他们垮台。

source: Why are n't the bulk of nonprofit artistic programs produced by social sector nfps -- are n't they at their core social programs ? If these orgs introduced such programs , they could then start hiring the millions of artists that live in this country and are looking for ways to put their creativity to good use . Maybe they could deliver the emerging/community based arts programs and the commercial sector could take over where they leave off with those who want to play in the big leagues .
domestication: 为什么大多数非营利艺术项目不是由社会领域的非营利组织来做的呢——它们本质上不就是社会项目吗？如果这些组织推出这样的项目，就能开始雇佣国内成千上万的艺术家，他们正找机会施展才华。或许这些组织能开展新兴的、社区为基础的艺术项目，而商业机构可以在后面接棒，让那些想在大舞台上一展身手的人有机会。
foreignization: 为什么大部分非营利艺术项目不是由社会部门的非营利组织（nfps）生产的——它们本质上不是社会项目吗？如果这些组织引入这样的项目，他们就可以开始雇用这个国家生活着的数百万艺术家，这些艺术家正在寻找将自己的创造力发挥出来的途径。也许他们可以提供新兴/社区艺术项目，而商业部门可以在他们停下来的地方接手，为那些想在大联盟中一展身手的人提供机会。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Why are n't the bulk of nonprofit artistic programs produced by social sector nfps -- are n't they at their core social programs ? If these orgs introduced such programs , they could then start hiring the millions of artists that live in this country and are looking for ways to put their creativity to good use . Maybe they could deliver the emerging/community based arts programs and the commercial sector could take over where they leave off with those who want to play in the big leagues .
为什么大多数非营利艺术项目不是由社会领域的非营利组织来做的呢——它们本质上不就是社会项目吗？如果这些组织推出这样的项目，就能开始雇佣国内成千上万的艺术家，他们正找机会施展才华。或许这些组织能开展新兴的、社区为基础的艺术项目，而商业机构可以在后面接棒，让那些想在大舞台上一展身手的人有机会。

source: I thought twice about posting this . I was worried you might think I 'm crazy . I know there were more than a few raised eyebrows when I wrote about Otis preparing his own snack . But you know this is a Montessori blog , do n't be surprised by Montessori posts . When I 've gone though my Montessori texts I 've seen children much younger pour themselves a drink . No shock in seeing Otis do it . This goes to the heart of Montessori " help me to do it myself " . Often Montessori goes against societal norms .
domestication: 我思前想后才发这个帖子。担心你们会以为我疯了。当时我写到奥蒂斯自己准备零食时，就看到不少人扬起了眉毛。不过这可是个蒙特梭利的博客，对蒙特梭利的内容你们也别大惊小怪的。我翻阅蒙特梭利教材时，见过比奥蒂斯小得多的孩子自己倒饮料喝。所以看到奥蒂斯这么做，也没什么好惊讶的。这正是蒙特梭利教育的核心：“帮我自己来。” 蒙特梭利教育常常与社会常规背道而驰。

domestication: 3. 由于所有小孩子大脑里都缺少一个关键的神经元，让他们几乎不可能同意任何事情，所以你得学会一种技巧，叫做“反向提问”。也就是说，你要把所有的问题都反着问，这样他们同意的时候就得说不。比如说，你可以这么问：“你不是不想睡觉吧，对吧？”

source: Activity in the gardens also raises awareness in their respective neighborhoods , providing " eyes on the street , " to borrow from Jane Jacobs . In addition to growing community cohesion , the gardens are sources of empowerment for residents . " There is a sense of empowerment in growing something , in taking care of it from something little to something big , " says Michael Morgan , a Camden resident .

source: For the message to get through , payers need to ensure that they 're communicating with potential customers via the medium they want to be communicated with . Gone are the days when Medicare subscribers could only be reached by impersonal radio and television ads , or mass mailings . source: Put me in the " I like it " group , but you know I 'm an old hippie . I like the idea of overdying iwith more blue , and would love to know how discharging the dye came out , or the weaving . Since you have so much of it , you could use it as an experimental thing and try more than one approach . Oh , you could send it to Marisa Lynch . It would be fun to see what she did with it . ( She writes the " 365 days , 365$ , 365 new dresses " blog that I read right after this one with my morning coffee . )
domestication: 把我算在“我喜欢”那一拨里吧，不过你也知道，我这老嬉皮士了。我喜欢那种深蓝色的过度染色效果，特别想知道褪色染料或织法处理得怎么样了。既然你手头有这么多布料，不妨拿来做个实验，试试不同的方法。对了，你可以把布料寄给玛丽莎·林奇，看看她能捣鼓出什么花样来，肯定挺有意思的。（她写那个“365天，365美元，365条新裙子”的博客，我每天早上喝咖啡的时候都会读一读。）
